examples.title: Add ActualText to Image Structure Elements for PDF Accessibility
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, accesses its tagged‑content API, and adds alternative text to each image by setting the ActualText attribute on a FigureElement and linking it to the XImage resource, improving accessibility for screen readers.

examples.title: Add ActualText to a Span for Pronunciation in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged content, creates a Span element, sets visible text and hidden pronunciation via the ActualText property, then saves the updated PDF.

examples.title: Add Caption to Figure in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a Figure element in a tagged PDF and attach a Note element as a caption using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Custom Tag to Paragraph in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a tagged PDF, add a paragraph element, assign a custom tag name, and save the document while handling platform‑specific rendering issues.

examples.title: Add External Link with Title to Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates inserting a link element into a PDF's tagged structure, assigning an external URL, and defining its title attribute for accessibility.

examples.title: Add Internal Link to Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a LinkElement with role /Link in a tagged PDF, associating it with a LocalHyperlink that points to a specific page, and optionally adding a visible LinkAnnotation for testing.

examples.title: Add a Note Element to a Paragraph in a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a paragraph and attach a note (footnote/endnote) as its child in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then save the updated document.

examples.title: Add Page Break to Tagged PDF Using Logical Structure
examples.description: Shows how to insert a page‑break element into the logical structure tree of a tagged PDF for improved accessibility using Aspose.Pdf's TaggedContent API.

examples.title: Add Paragraph with ActualText under TOCI in a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a TOCI (Table of Contents Item) element in a tagged PDF, add a paragraph beneath it, and set the paragraph's ActualText for accessibility.

examples.title: Add Placeholder TextBox Form Field and Tag as /Form Element
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextBox form field with placeholder text, adds it to the document's form, and tags the field with a /Form structure element for accessibility.

examples.title: Add Table to Tagged PDF Structure
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a 3x4 table within the logical structure tree of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API and save the updated document.

examples.title: Batch Add Missing Tags to PDFs
examples.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder, enables Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging to add missing accessibility tags, and saves each updated document with a configurable suffix.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Tagged PDF/UA with Auto‑Tagging
examples.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder, enables Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging, converts each document to PDF/UA format, and saves the tagged PDFs to a separate output folder.

examples.title: Batch PDF Validation with XML Logs and Compliance Dashboard
examples.description: Demonstrates how to validate multiple PDF files against PDF/UA, generate XML validation logs, compute a simple compliance metric, and display results in a console dashboard.

examples.title: Batch PDF/A-1B Validation with XML Logs and CSV Summary
examples.description: Demonstrates how to validate multiple PDF files for PDF/A‑1B compliance using Aspose.Pdf, generate individual XML validation logs, and compile a summary CSV report.

examples.title: Check PDF/UA Compliance and Log Result
examples.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, checks its PDF/UA (accessibility) compliance, outputs the boolean to the console, and writes the result to a log file for further processing.

examples.title: Create Nested Bullet and Numbered List in a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to build a top‑level bullet list with a nested numbered sub‑list in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API, and validates the structure tree before saving.

examples.title: Create Tagged Form Field in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a text box form field, register it in the AcroForm, and link it to a /Form structure element for tagged PDF accessibility.

examples.title: Create Tagged PDF with Heading and Language
examples.description: Shows how to create a new PDF, add a level‑1 heading structure element, assign a language attribute, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

examples.title: Create Tagged PDF with Table of Contents
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate an accessible tagged PDF, set language and title metadata, add a Table of Contents page, create heading and paragraph elements, and link TOC entries to the corresponding sections using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Tagged Table Header with Merged Cells in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a tagged table header with merged cells, assign the TH role, and set ActualText for accessibility using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Custom Table Cell Borders in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, adding a table, and applying different border styles to rows and cells based on the row index using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Enable Automatic Tagging for PDF/UA Conversion
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF to a PDF/UA‑compliant tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf's automatic tagging feature.

examples.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to JSON
examples.description: Loads a tagged PDF, extracts its logical structure tree, converts it into a serializable object, and writes the hierarchy to a JSON file for accessibility analysis.

examples.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to XML and Generate Report via XSLT
examples.description: Shows how to export a PDF's accessibility structure tree to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf and then transform that XML with an XSLT stylesheet to create an HTML report.

examples.title: Export Tagged PDF Structure to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to read a PDF's tagged structure with Aspose.Pdf, build a hierarchical POCO model, and serialize it to a JSON file while preserving the document hierarchy.

examples.title: Extract Notes from Tagged PDF to Text File
examples.description: Loads a tagged PDF, finds all NoteElement objects in the logical structure, concatenates their visible text, and writes the result to a plain‑text file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Link URLs to CSV
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through link annotations, retrieve their URI actions, and write the page number and URL to a CSV file.

examples.title: Extract Text from Tagged PDF Structure Tree
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its tagged content, and recursively walk the structure tree to retrieve ActualText or AlternativeText from each element.

examples.title: Iterate Tagged PDF Structure Elements and Log Metadata
examples.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged content, and recursively walks the logical structure tree, printing each element's title, language, and custom tag.

examples.title: List Image IDs with Missing Alt Text from Validation XML
examples.description: Loads a validation XML file, filters errors where Alt text is missing, and outputs the distinct image IDs.

examples.title: Modify Paragraph ActualText in a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Loads a tagged PDF, finds a paragraph whose ActualText matches a given title, updates the text using SetText, and saves the corrected document.

examples.title: Create Nested Table Inside Paragraph for Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to build a tagged PDF where a paragraph contains an outer table, which in turn holds a nested inner table, and validates the logical structure hierarchy.

examples.title: Parse XML Validation Report and Summarize Errors
examples.description: Loads an XML validation report, counts occurrences of each error code, collects distinct messages, and prints a concise summary with sample messages.

examples.title: Propagate Language Attribute to All Tagged PDF Elements
examples.description: Shows how to set a language attribute on the root of a tagged PDF and recursively propagate it to every descendant structure element for improved accessibility.

examples.title: Replace Note Element in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to locate an existing NoteElement in a tagged PDF, remove it, and insert a new note with updated text using Aspose.Pdf's TaggedContent API.

examples.title: Set Document Language Attribute in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a language attribute to the structure tree of a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf by setting the document-wide language and the root structure element.

examples.title: Set Figure Title in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a Figure element in a tagged PDF, assign a concise Title and alternative text, and add it to the structure tree using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Language for All Structure Elements in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to assign a default language to a PDF document and ensure every tagged structure element has an explicit language attribute using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Paragraph Title in Tagged PDF for Accessibility
examples.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically assign a title (summary) to a paragraph element in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, enhancing document accessibility.

examples.title: Set Root Structure Element Title in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to assign a document title and set the Title property on the root structure element of a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Style Table Cells with Background Color, Border, and Padding
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF table with Aspose.Pdf and apply visual styling to each cell, including background color, border thickness/color, and padding to improve accessibility.

examples.title: Tag Table Cells with Data Types and Validate PDF/A Compliance
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a visual table, build a corresponding logical‑structure table with custom data‑type tags, and validate the PDF for PDF/A‑1B compliance using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Update Language of a Tagged PDF Element to French
examples.description: Shows how to set the default document language and change the language attribute of a specific ParagraphElement in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Validate PDF/UA Compliance and Generate XML Report
examples.description: Demonstrates how to validate a tagged PDF against the PDF/UA standard using Aspose.Pdf, save the compliance results as an XML report, and read the built‑in compliance flag.

examples.title: Add Blank Page to PDF Document
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load an existing PDF, append a new blank page, and save the updated file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add XMP Metadata to PDF and Save
examples.description: Loads a PDF, builds a custom XMP packet, attaches it to the document, and saves the file while preserving the new metadata.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, convert each to PDF/A‑1b using Aspose.Pdf, and write the converted files (with optional error logs) to an output directory.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with High Compression
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, convert each to PDF/A‑1b using Aspose.Pdf with file‑size optimization, and create a CSV summary report of the conversion results.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with CSV Log
examples.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDF files, convert each to PDF/A‑1b using Aspose.Pdf, and record the conversion outcome in a CSV log file.

examples.title: Batch Decrypt Encrypted PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to open a collection of encrypted PDF files with a shared owner password, remove their encryption, and save unprotected copies to an output folder.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Passwords from Configuration
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read a JSON configuration file containing multiple encryption jobs and encrypt each PDF with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf, while handling file validation and logging.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with File‑Name Based Passwords
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf, generate a unique password from each file name, and log the passwords securely.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with a User Password
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a folder using Aspose.Pdf by applying the same user and owner passwords and saving the encrypted files to a separate directory.

examples.title: Compress PDF Using Default Settings
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, save it using the default compression options, and compare the original and compressed file sizes.

examples.title: Compress PDF with High Optimization Level
examples.description: Loads a PDF, applies aggressive optimization (object compression, font subsetting, unused object removal) using Aspose.Pdf, and saves the result with PdfSaveOptions while reporting the size reduction.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Embedded Fonts
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A‑1b compliance (embedding any missing fonts), and save the resulting archival PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Metadata Preservation
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A‑1b compliance while preserving the document's metadata, and save the resulting file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, convert it to PDF/A‑1b compliance, and save the resulting file while handling missing files and conversion errors.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b Compliance
examples.description: Loads a PDF file, converts it to PDF/A‑1b compliance while logging conversion errors, and saves the compliant document.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X-3 with CMYK Color Space
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, set up PdfFormatConversionOptions for PDF/X-3 compliance with a CMYK ICC profile, perform the conversion, and save the resulting file.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X‑3 Preserving ICC Profiles
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert an existing PDF to PDF/X‑3 format using Aspose.Pdf while keeping any embedded ICC color profiles intact for accurate printing.

examples.title: Create PDF/A-1b Document with Text Paragraph
examples.description: The example creates a new PDF document, adds a text paragraph to the first page, and converts the file to PDF/A‑1b format while handling platform‑specific GDI+ requirements.

examples.title: Create PDF/X‑3 Document with Multiple Pages
examples.description: Shows how to create a new PDF, add three blank pages, convert it to PDF/X‑3 format, and save the file, including cross‑platform handling for missing GDI+.

examples.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF Using User Password
examples.description: Demonstrates opening a password‑protected PDF with Aspose.Pdf, removing its encryption, and saving an unprotected copy.

examples.title: Download PDF from URL and Save Locally with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to download a PDF file using HttpClient, load it into an Aspose.Pdf Document from a stream, and save it to the local file system.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑128 and Set Printing Permissions
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑128 with Aspose.Pdf, assign printing and high‑quality printing permissions, and verify the encryption by opening the file with the user password.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Disable Printing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256, set no permissions to disable printing, and verify the encryption status with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF Allowing Only Form Filling
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, restrict permissions to form filling only, encrypt it with AES‑256, and save the protected document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Restrict to Form Filling
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load an existing PDF, encrypt it with user and owner passwords using AES‑256, and limit permissions to only form filling while disabling printing.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Form Filling Permission Only
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption that permits only form filling (disabling content extraction), and saving the protected document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password Only (AES‑256)
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by applying an owner password only, using AES‑256 encryption and disabling all user permissions.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit RC4 and Verify Size Increase
examples.description: Loads a PDF, applies 128‑bit RC4 encryption with specific permissions, saves the encrypted file, and checks that the encrypted file size is slightly larger than the original.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 and Verify Permissions
examples.description: The example encrypts a PDF using the RC4 128‑bit algorithm, restricts permissions to printing only, and programmatically verifies the security settings by attempting to open the file with and without passwords.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF Stream with Passwords
examples.description: Shows how to read a PDF from a stream, apply AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords and specific permissions, and write the secured PDF back to another stream using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password Only (No Editing or Copying)
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by applying a user password, leaving the owner password empty, and disabling all permissions such as editing and copying.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Passwords and Restrict Printing
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, set permissions to disable printing, and save the encrypted document.

examples.title: Export PDF as PDF/X-3 with Color Profiles
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/X‑3 compliance while preserving ICC color profiles, and save the resulting file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Pages to Separate Files
examples.description: Shows how to split a PDF into individual one‑page PDF files by iterating over each page with Aspose.Pdf and saving each page as a new document.

examples.title: Insert a PDF Page into Another PDF at a Specific Position
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load two PDF documents, insert a page from one document into a specific position of the other using Aspose.Pdf, and save the result.

examples.title: Load PDF from MemoryStream and Convert to PDF 1.4
examples.description: The example demonstrates loading a PDF from a byte array via MemoryStream, converting its PDF version to 1.4 using Document.Convert, and saving the result to the file system.

examples.title: Open Password-Protected PDF Without Password
examples.description: Demonstrates how to attempt opening an encrypted PDF using Aspose.Pdf without providing a password and handling the resulting InvalidPasswordException.

examples.title: Open PDF from FileStream and Save with Default Settings
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF document using a FileStream and then save it to another file using Aspose.Pdf with default options.

examples.title: Open PDF and Get Page Count
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF file from disk using Aspose.Pdf's Document constructor and retrieve the total number of pages.

examples.title: Open PDF and Save Without Embedding Fonts
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF via a FileStream, configuring save options to replace missing fonts with a system font, and saving the document without embedding fonts.

examples.title: Remove Third Page from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete the third page when present, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate each page by 180 degrees, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate Second Page of PDF by 90 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate the second page 90° clockwise, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Save PDF with Incremental Update Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates copying an existing PDF, opening it with a read‑write stream, appending a new page, and saving the document using Aspose.Pdf's incremental update mode to preserve the original content.

examples.title: Save PDF to MemoryStream and Write to File
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, save it into a MemoryStream, and then copy the stream to a physical file on disk.

examples.title: Set PDF Document Metadata (Author, Title, Subject) with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF, assign author, title, and subject information using Aspose.Pdf, save the file, and then verify the metadata by re‑opening the document.

examples.title: Set PDF Document Title and Verify It
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set its document title metadata, save the file, and then re‑open it to confirm the title was persisted.

examples.title: Split PDF into Two Parts at Page Ten
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract pages before and after a specified split point, and save each segment as separate PDF files with descriptive filenames.

examples.title: Split PDF into Individual Page PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to split a large PDF into separate one‑page PDF files, each stored in its own folder, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Split PDF into Sections Using Page Ranges
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read page‑range definitions from a text file, extract those pages from a source PDF, and save each range as a separate PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to split a multi‑page PDF into separate one‑page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's Document class and the Pages collection.

examples.title: Update PDF Author Metadata Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF via a FileInfo object, modify the Author metadata, and overwrite the original file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Update PDF Author Metadata
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, replace the Author metadata with the current user name, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Update Passwords of an Encrypted PDF
examples.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF with Aspose.Pdf, change its user and owner passwords, and save the PDF with the new credentials.

examples.title: Update PDF Title Metadata from Byte Array
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a byte array, modify its title metadata, and save the updated document to disk using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Update PDF Version to 1.5 with Incremental Save
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF version 1.5, and save the changes using Aspose.Pdf's incremental update feature.

examples.title: Case‑Insensitive PDF Text Comparison
examples.description: Demonstrates how to perform a case‑insensitive comparison of two PDF files by normalizing all text fragments to lower case before using Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer.

examples.title: Compare Encrypted PDFs Using Side‑by‑Side Comparison
examples.description: The example opens two password‑protected PDF files by providing their passwords to the Document constructors, then performs a side‑by‑side comparison of the first pages and saves the result PDF.

examples.title: Compare Specific Page Range of Two PDFs
examples.description: Loads two PDF files, validates a user‑defined page range, and uses Aspose.Pdf's comparison engine to detect text differences on each page within that range.

examples.title: Compare PDFs and Detect Font Changes
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer to compare two PDF documents page‑by‑page and report font‑related differences as separate diff operations.

examples.title: Compare PDFs Excluding Digital Signature Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents while treating digital signature fields as unchanged regions by collecting their rectangles and passing them as exclude areas to the comparison engine.

examples.title: Compare PDFs While Excluding Footer Areas
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents side‑by‑side while excluding footer regions by defining rectangular exclusion areas for each document.

examples.title: Compare PDFs Including Form Field Values
examples.description: Loads two PDF files, compares them page‑by‑page using Aspose.Pdf.Comparison, and saves a visual diff PDF. Form field values are included automatically in the comparison.

examples.title: Compare PDFs and Log Differences by Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents page‑by‑page using Aspose.Pdf, extract the diff operations, and write an audit log containing the operation type and page number.

examples.title: Compare PDFs Page by Page and Generate Diff PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents page by page using Aspose.Pdf's default ComparisonOptions and save the visual differences to a diff PDF file.

examples.title: Compare PDFs Textually While Ignoring Compression
examples.description: Loads two PDFs with identical content but different compression settings and performs a flat text comparison using Aspose.Pdf.Comparison, outputting textual differences and saving a visual diff PDF.

examples.title: Compare PDFs with Unicode Text Differences
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents that use different language encodings, detect Unicode text differences, and generate a visual diff PDF.

examples.title: Compare PDFs with Excluded Areas
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents while excluding specific rectangular regions from each document using Aspose.Pdf's ComparisonOptions.

examples.title: Compare Selected PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting specific pages from two PDFs and comparing them with Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer, producing a visual diff PDF and a list of changes per page.

examples.title: Compare Two PDFs and Generate Visual Difference Report
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's comparison API to detect differences between two PDF files and save a visual diff report as a new PDF.

examples.title: Copy PDF Metadata to Diff Document After Comparison
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs with Aspose.Pdf, generate a diff PDF, and preserve the original document's metadata by copying it to the diff file.

examples.title: Create Diff PDF Using CompareDocumentsToPdf
examples.description: The example loads two PDF files, compares them with Aspose.Pdf.Comparison's GraphicalPdfComparer, and saves a diff PDF that highlights the changes to a specified output folder.

examples.title: Exclude Annotations from PDF Comparison
examples.description: Shows how to gather annotation bounding rectangles from two PDFs and configure side‑by‑side comparison to ignore those areas using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Generate Diff PDF with Highlighted Changes
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer to create a diff PDF with highlighted text changes and verify the default highlight color.

examples.title: Generate JSON Diff Report for PDF Comparison
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's TextPdfComparer, iterate over DiffOperation objects, and generate a JSON diff report.

examples.title: Generate PDF Diff Images and Zip Them
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf, create visual diff images for each page, and package the images into a ZIP archive for easy distribution.

examples.title: Generate Visual Diff PDF Using GraphicalPdfComparer
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files graphically and create a visual diff PDF with Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer.

examples.title: Get Image Differences Between PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare corresponding pages of two PDF documents and retrieve the pixel‑level image differences using Aspose.Pdf's graphical comparer.

examples.title: Parallel Batch PDF Comparison with Concurrency Limit
examples.description: Demonstrates comparing multiple PDFs against a reference document in parallel while restricting the maximum degree of parallelism to control memory consumption.

examples.title: Parallel PDF Comparison with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare multiple pairs of PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's side‑by‑side comparer and .NET parallel processing.

examples.title: Replace Inserted Text in PDF Using DiffOperation
examples.description: The example loads two PDFs, compares each page with TextPdfComparer to find insert operations, and replaces the inserted text in the second PDF with the original text from the first PDF before saving the result.

examples.title: Set Custom Image Similarity Tolerance for PDF Comparison
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two scanned‑image PDFs using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer while applying a custom tolerance percentage to ignore minor image differences.

examples.title: Side‑by‑Side PDF Comparison with Page Size Alignment
examples.description: Demonstrates comparing two PDFs that have different page sizes using Aspose.Pdf's side‑by‑side comparer and verifies the resulting document contains the expected number of pages.

examples.title: Add Company Logo to PDF and Convert to PPTX
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, stamping each page with a logo image, and converting the modified document to a PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add File Attachment to PDF/A‑3b Document
examples.description: Demonstrates embedding an external text file as an attachment, adding a file‑attachment annotation, and converting the PDF to PDF/A‑3b compliance using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add XML Attachment to PDF/A-1b Document
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, converting it to PDF/A‑1b compliance, embedding an external XML file as an attachment, and saving the resulting PDF/A‑1b file.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images with Custom Naming
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, convert each page to a JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf, and save the images with a custom naming pattern.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Multi‑Page TIFF
examples.description: Shows how to merge all PDF files in a folder and convert the combined document into a multi‑page TIFF archive using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PNG While Preserving Folder Structure
examples.description: Demonstrates how to recursively convert all PDF files in a source directory to PNG images using Aspose.Pdf, creating matching subfolders in a destination directory.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PPTX with SlidesAsImages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple PDF files to PPTX format in a single run, using Aspose.Pdf with the SlidesAsImages option enabled to rasterize each slide as an image.

examples.title: Convert EPUB to PDF with Custom Page Size
examples.description: Shows how to load an EPUB file using EpubLoadOptions to set a custom page size and convert it to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert LaTeX File to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a LaTeX (.tex) file with Aspose.Pdf, configuring TeX options, and saving the rendered document as a PDF.

examples.title: Convert Markdown to PDF Preserving Code Blocks
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a Markdown file with MdLoadOptions and convert it directly to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, preserving formatting such as code blocks.

examples.title: Convert OFD to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load an OFD document using OfdLoadOptions and save it as a PDF with default settings using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PCL to PDF with HP‑GL/2 Vector Support
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PCL file, enabling HP‑GL/2 vector graphics via the NewEngine conversion engine, and saving the result as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF Page Region to PNG
examples.description: Shows how to extract a defined rectangular region from a PDF page and render it as a PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF Page to JPEG Image
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, validate a page number, and convert that specific page to a JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf's JpegDevice with the default DPI.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG Images
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, and save the pages as JPEG files using JpegDevice with the default quality setting.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to Separate HTML Files
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configure HtmlSaveOptions to split the document into pages, and save each page as an individual HTML file.

examples.title: Convert PDF to BMP Images

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations and Form Fields to XFDF with Diagnostic Logging

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations with Page Numbers to CSV
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's annotations, retrieve a readable name, and write the page number and annotation name to a CSV file.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to Pretty‑Printed XFDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file and format the XML with indentation for easier manual editing.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF with Custom Namespace
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file and replace the default XFDF namespace with a custom one using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor and exporting all its annotations to an XFDF file using a file stream.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Memory Stream
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export selected annotation types from specific PDF pages into an XFDF format using a memory stream for further processing.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Using MemoryStream
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF from a byte array, export all its annotations to XFDF, and obtain the XFDF data as a byte array using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Extract Annotation Rectangles and Visualize as PDF Pages
examples.description: Reads a source PDF, extracts the rectangle of each annotation, and creates a new PDF where each page visualizes one annotation rectangle in red for easy inspection.

examples.title: Extract and Group PDF Annotations by Author
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all annotations from a PDF, group them by the author (Title property) and print a concise report.

examples.title: Extract PDF Annotation Details into Custom DTO
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to iterate through a PDF, read each annotation's name, type, and rectangle, and store the information in a custom C# object.

examples.title: Extract PDF Annotations and Write to JSON Audit Log
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, extracts all annotations using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade, gathers key properties, serializes them to JSON, and writes the result to an audit log file.

examples.title: Flatten Annotations on First Five PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to use PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations on pages 1‑5 of a PDF document and save the result.

examples.title: Flatten Annotations in PDFs on a Network Share
examples.description: Shows how to enumerate PDF files in a network folder and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations, overwriting each original file.

examples.title: Flatten PDF and Tag with Custom Metadata
examples.description: Demonstrates how to flatten a PDF (remove interactive form fields while preserving appearance) and then add a custom metadata entry that records the flattening date.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations from Stream
examples.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF provided as a stream and return the modified PDF as a MemoryStream, avoiding any file system access.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Log File Sizes
examples.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor and log the original and flattened file sizes for audit tracking.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Log Size Reduction
examples.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, then record and display the original and reduced file sizes for audit purposes.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations While Preserving Appearance
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, flattening all annotations into static graphics while keeping their visual appearance, and saving the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations with Optional Verbose Logging
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to bind a PDF, flatten all its annotations, and save the result, with a command‑line flag for verbose logging.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Verify Removal
examples.description: The example flattens all annotations in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then iterates through each page to confirm that no annotation objects remain.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Verify Removal
examples.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then scans each page to ensure no annotation objects remain.

examples.title: Flatten PDF Annotations to Non‑Editable Visual Elements
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations in a PDF, converting them into static visual content and saving the result.

examples.title: Flatten PDFs and Save to Custom Output Directory
examples.description: Demonstrates how to flatten form fields in PDF files and write the flattened PDFs to a user‑specified output folder using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Get Annotation Count Per PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and count the annotations on each page, returning a dictionary of page numbers to counts.

examples.title: Get Annotation Names by Author from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through pages and annotations, and return the names of markup annotations whose Title matches a given author.

examples.title: Health Check: Bind PdfAnnotationEditor to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates a simple health check that loads a PDF and binds it to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to verify that the binding succeeds without errors.

examples.title: Import Annotations While Preserving Existing Ones
examples.description: Demonstrates how to import annotations from multiple source PDFs into a target PDF without removing the annotations that already exist in the target document.

examples.title: Import XFDF Annotations into Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to import a single XFDF file containing reviewer comments into several PDF documents, creating new PDFs that include the same annotations.

examples.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, import annotations from an XFDF file, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF from Streams
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF and an XFDF file as streams, bind the PDF to PdfAnnotationEditor, import annotations from the XFDF stream, and save the updated PDF without using temporary files.

examples.title: Import XFDF Annotations onto Selected PDF Pages
examples.description: Exports annotations from a source PDF for a specified page range into a temporary XFDF file and then imports those annotations into a target PDF, showing how to transfer page‑specific annotations using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Import XFDF Data into PDF and Delete Temporary File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to import XFDF form data into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, save the updated document, and delete the temporary XFDF file after a successful operation.

examples.title: List Annotation Names in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, extract all annotations, and write each annotation's Name to the console for debugging.

examples.title: Log Annotation Modification Timestamps in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, iterate through all annotations, update their Modified timestamp, and save the changes. Useful for tracking when each annotation was last edited.

examples.title: Log Annotation Operation Durations in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add, modify, and delete a text annotation in a PDF while measuring each operation's execution time using Stopwatch for performance logging.

examples.title: Log PDF Annotation Deletions
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through all PDF pages, collect annotation details, log each deletion (name, type, page) to a file, and remove the annotations using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Measure Flatten Annotations Performance on PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and measures the time taken to assess performance impact.

examples.title: Merge Annotation Layers from Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to import annotation layers from several source PDFs into a base PDF and save the combined result using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Merge Multiple XFDF Files and Import into PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to combine several XFDF annotation/field files into a single XFDF stream and then import the merged data into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Modify Annotation Author on Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to change the author of annotations on a given PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

examples.title: Modify PDF Annotation Authors with Retry and Exponential Backoff
examples.description: Demonstrates using PdfAnnotationEditor to change annotation authors in a PDF and applying an exponential backoff retry policy for transient I/O errors.

examples.title: Modify PDF Annotation Subject and Color
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change the subject and color of a specific PDF annotation by creating a new TextAnnotation and applying it with the PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations method.

examples.title: Modify PDF Annotation Subject Using PdfAnnotationEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a text annotation, then using PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations to update the annotation's Subject property and verifying the change in a unit test.

examples.title: Monitor Folder and Flatten PDF Annotations
examples.description: Demonstrates a background service that watches a directory for new PDF files and uses Aspose.Pdf to flatten all annotations, saving the result with a suffix.

examples.title: PDF Annotation Helper for Deleting, Flattening and XFDF Operations
examples.description: Shows a static helper class that uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to bind a PDF, delete or flatten annotations (optionally by type or page range), and export or import annotations via XFDF streams.

examples.title: PDF Annotation Helper Wrapper for Common Tasks
examples.description: Shows a wrapper class that abstracts Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to perform common annotation operations such as delete, flatten, export, import, redact, and modify annotation metadata.

examples.title: PDF Annotation Utility: Delete, Flatten, Export
examples.description: Demonstrates a command‑line tool that uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades to delete specific pages, flatten annotations, and export annotations to an XFDF file.

examples.title: Prevent Flattening of Signed PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to detect digital signatures in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature and conditionally flatten the document only when no signatures are present, preserving signature validity.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor
examples.description: Creates a PDF with two text annotations, uses PdfAnnotationEditor.DeleteAnnotations to delete them, and validates the removal with a unit test.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF to PdfAnnotationEditor, delete every annotation, and save the cleaned document using streams.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, delete every annotation using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade, and save the cleaned file.

examples.title: Remove All Annotations from PDFs in a Folder
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to delete every annotation from each PDF file in a given directory and save the cleaned documents.

examples.title: Delete Link Annotations from PDF Pages 3‑7
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, delete link annotations (intended for pages 3 through 7), and save the modified document.

examples.title: Remove Old Annotations from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to batch‑remove PDF annotations that are older than a specified number of days using Aspose.Pdf's annotation editor.

examples.title: Rename PDF Annotation Names with Standard Prefix
examples.description: Shows how to batch rename annotation names in a PDF by adding a standardized prefix using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

examples.title: Set All Annotation Open Flags to True
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through each page and its annotations, and setting the Open property of TextAnnotation and PopupAnnotation to true before saving the document.

examples.title: Set Read‑Only Flag on PDF Annotations
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply the ReadOnly annotation flag using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade and save the updated PDF.

examples.title: Skip Flattening Read‑Only Annotations During Batch PDF Processing
examples.description: Demonstrates batch processing of PDF files, iterating through pages and annotations, and conditionally flattening them while skipping annotations marked as read‑only based on a configuration flag.

examples.title: Test ExportAnnotationsXfdf Throws Exception on Unbound PdfAnnotationEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how ExportAnnotationsXfdf raises an exception when called on a PdfAnnotationEditor that hasn't been bound to a PDF document.

examples.title: Update Annotation Modified Date in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF in memory, add a TextAnnotation, set its Modified property to DateTime.Now, and apply the change with PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations.

examples.title: Validate Exported XFDF Against Schema
examples.description: Exports PDF annotations or form fields to an XFDF file using the Form facade and then validates the generated XFDF against the official XFDF XSD schema.

examples.title: Validate PDF Integrity After Adding Annotations
examples.description: Shows how to add a text annotation to a PDF, save the modified file, and validate its integrity by detecting corrupted objects using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Bookmarks and Verify Count in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates adding page bookmarks to a PDF with PdfBookmarkEditor, saving the file, then extracting the bookmarks to confirm the expected number.

examples.title: Add Child Bookmarks Under a Parent Bookmark
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a parent bookmark (e.g., a chapter) and attach child bookmarks representing sections using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

examples.title: Add External URL Bookmarks to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create bookmarks that open external web URLs in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add JavaScript Bookmark to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF bookmark that executes a JavaScript alert using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add Top-Level Blue Bookmark to First Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a new top-level bookmark that points to page 1 of a PDF and set its title color to blue using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Adjust PDF Bookmarks After Inserting Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert blank pages at the beginning of a PDF and shift existing bookmark destinations to keep them accurate, using Aspose.Pdf's bookmark editor.

examples.title: Batch Add "Reviewed" Bookmark to PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF files in a directory, add a "Reviewed" bookmark on the last page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor, and save the updated PDFs to an output folder.

examples.title: Batch Add Table of Contents Bookmark to PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over all PDF files in a folder and add a top‑level "Table of Contents" bookmark to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Batch Delete Bookmarks from Encrypted PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open encrypted PDF files with a password, remove all bookmarks using the PdfBookmarkEditor, and save the cleaned PDFs in a batch loop.

examples.title: Collapse Specific PDF Bookmarks
examples.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically collapse selected bookmarks in a PDF by setting their Open property to false using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Color PDF Bookmarks Based on Content
examples.description: Shows how to read existing PDF bookmarks, set their title color to red for warnings and green for informational sections, and rewrite the bookmarks using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

examples.title: Create Bookmark to Named Destination in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a bookmark that references a named destination defined elsewhere in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor facade.

examples.title: Create Bookmarks for Each Image in a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages, locate image resources, and add a bookmark for each image that links to its page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Create Hierarchical PDF Bookmarks with PdfBookmarkEditor
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file to PdfBookmarkEditor, build a chapter/section bookmark hierarchy, and save the PDF with the new bookmarks.

examples.title: Delete All Bookmarks from a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove every bookmark from a PDF document using the PdfBookmarkEditor facade and save the cleaned file.

examples.title: Delete a Bookmark and Verify Removal
examples.description: Shows how to remove a specific bookmark from a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor and then confirm the deletion by extracting the remaining bookmarks.

examples.title: Delete Bookmarks Matching a Regex Pattern
examples.description: Shows how to remove PDF bookmarks whose titles match a regular expression using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

examples.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to CSV
examples.description: Shows how to extract all bookmarks from a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor and write each bookmark's title, destination page, and hierarchy level to a CSV file.

examples.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to CSV for Excel
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts its bookmark hierarchy with PdfBookmarkEditor, and writes each bookmark's title, level, and destination page number to a CSV file that can be opened directly in Excel.

examples.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting bookmarks from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor, converting the hierarchical bookmark structure into a custom model, and serializing it to a pretty‑printed JSON file.

examples.description: Shows how to extract the hierarchical bookmark structure from a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor and serialize it to a JSON file with title, level, and page number for each node.

examples.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to Text Outline
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all bookmarks from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and write them to a plain‑text file with indentation that reflects the bookmark hierarchy.

examples.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to XML
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with PdfBookmarkEditor and exporting its complete bookmark hierarchy to an XML file for external documentation tools.

examples.title: Import Bookmarks from CSV into PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates reading a CSV file, building a hierarchical bookmark structure, and applying it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Import Bookmarks from Database into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to retrieve bookmark titles and page numbers (simulated as database records) and add them to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor.

examples.title: Import Bookmarks from JSON into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to read a JSON file with bookmark definitions, map them to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Bookmark objects, and add the hierarchy to an existing PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor.

examples.title: Import OFD Bookmarks into a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load an OFD file, extract its bookmarks as XML, and import them into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove Duplicate Bookmarks from PDF

examples.title: Rename PDF Bookmarks Using Translation Dictionary
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over a translation dictionary, renames matching bookmarks with PdfBookmarkEditor.ModifyBookmarks, and saves the updated document.

examples.title: Set Bookmark Zoom to 150% Using PdfBookmarkEditor
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with PdfBookmarkEditor, recursively traverse its bookmark hierarchy, set each bookmark's page display zoom to 150%, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Update Bookmark Destination to Page 10
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate a bookmark in a PDF by its object ID using Aspose.Pdf, change its destination to page 10, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Update PDF Bookmark Title Using MemoryStream
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF from a byte array with a MemoryStream, modify a bookmark title using PdfBookmarkEditor, and return the updated PDF as a byte array.

examples.description: Shows how to extract PDF bookmarks using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, convert each title to title case while preserving predefined proper nouns, and save the modified PDF.

examples.description: Extracts PDF bookmarks using the Facades API and compares their page numbers with a generated TOC file to identify mismatches, missing, or extra entries.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Images
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, and render them as separate PNG files using a specified resolution.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF document to BMP images using Aspose.Pdf, applying global font substitution for missing fonts and configuring rendering options.

examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, setting a 200 DPI resolution, and converting up to the first five pages to JPEG files.

examples.title: Batch Create 3‑by‑2 N‑up PDFs
