examples.description: Shows how to create a text stamp, rotate it 90° and add it as a text annotation to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Set Annotation Opacity in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a text annotation to a PDF page and set its opacity to 0.5 using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set CenterWindow Viewer Preference for PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to enable the CenterWindow viewer preference so that a PDF opens centered on the screen using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

examples.title: Set Continuous View Mode for PDF
examples.description: Shows how to enable continuous scrolling (single column layout) in a PDF by setting the viewer preference using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Set Hide Menubar Viewer Preference in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to read a PDF's current viewer preferences, enable the HideMenubar flag, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

examples.title: Set PDF Full‑Screen Viewer Preference
examples.description: Demonstrates how to enable the full‑screen viewer mode for a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Set PDF Permissions to Allow Copy and Block Form Editing
examples.description: Shows how to protect a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades by allowing text/graphics copying while preventing form field changes and annotation modifications.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Single Page Layout with 100% Zoom
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF's viewer preferences to use a single‑page continuous layout and set the default zoom level to 100 % using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Single-Page Layout
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to change a PDF's viewer preference to single‑page layout and save the modified document.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Show Outline Panel
examples.description: Shows how to configure the PDF viewer preference so the document outline (bookmarks) panel is displayed by default using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences to Hide Toolbar and Menu Bar
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade to set viewer preferences that hide the toolbar and menu bar when the PDF is opened.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences to Show Thumbnails and Fit Width
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor to configure viewer preferences so the PDF opens with the thumbnails pane visible and the window sized to fit the page width.

examples.title: Set Radio Button 'ShippingMethod' to Express in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF, select the "Express" option for the "ShippingMethod" radio button in the AcroForm, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Silently Print PDF to a Network Printer
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to bind a PDF file and send it to a network printer via its UNC path without showing any print dialogs.

examples.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files with Annotations
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to split an edited PDF, preserving its annotations, into separate one-page PDF documents.

examples.title: Stamp Image onto PDF from Memory Stream
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf without writing the image to disk, by loading the image into a MemoryStream and applying it to all pages.

examples.title: Toggle FullScreen Viewer Preference in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to enable or disable the FullScreen viewer preference of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Underline Specific Phrase on Fourth PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to search for a given phrase on the fourth page of a PDF and add a red underline annotation using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor facade.

examples.title: Update PDF Creator Metadata Using XMP Facade
examples.description: Shows how to load existing XMP metadata from a PDF, change the dc:creator field, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Validate PDF Integrity After Adding Margins
examples.description: Demonstrates how to edit a PDF with PdfFileEditor (adding uniform margins) and then verify the document's integrity by comparing SHA‑256 checksums of the original and edited files.

examples.title: Verify PDF Attachment After Save
examples.description: Shows how to add a file attachment to a PDF with PdfContentEditor, save the document, and confirm the attachment exists using PdfExtractor in a unit test.

examples.title: Verify Viewer Preference Persistence After Editing PDF
examples.description: Creates a PDF, sets a viewer preference using PdfContentEditor, saves it, reopens the file and asserts that the preference remains set.

examples.title: Asynchronous PDF Text, Image, and Attachment Extraction
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract text, images, and embedded attachments from a PDF file asynchronously using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to keep UI threads responsive.

examples.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs in Azure Blob Storage
examples.description: Demonstrates how to enumerate PDF files in an Azure Blob container, extract their text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and upload the resulting .txt files back to another container.

examples.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to loop through a folder of PDF files, use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from each document, and save the output as .txt files with matching filenames.

examples.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from every PDF in a directory and write each result to a corresponding .txt file.

examples.title: Check if PDF Contains Text via MemoryStream
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract text into a MemoryStream and determine whether a PDF file has any textual content.

examples.title: Check PDF for Both Text and Images
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to determine whether a PDF file contains at least one text element and at least one image.

examples.title: Check if PDF Is Text‑Only by Detecting Images
examples.description: The example uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to bind a PDF, extract its images, and then checks HasNextImage to determine whether any images are present, indicating the document is not text‑only.

examples.title: Configurable PDF Text, Image, and Attachment Extraction
examples.description: Demonstrates reading a JSON configuration to toggle extraction of text, images, and attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor without modifying the code.

examples.title: Count Pages, Images, and Attachments in a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to obtain the total number of pages, embedded images, and file attachments in a PDF document.

examples.title: Create Contact Sheet PDF from Extracted Images
examples.description: Extracts all images from a source PDF and generates a new PDF that displays those images as thumbnails arranged in a grid layout.

examples.title: Extract All Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract every image from a PDF document by setting the page range to all pages and iterating through the extracted images with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor.

examples.title: Extract First Three Pages Text and Create Summary PDF
examples.description: Shows how to extract text from the first three pages of a PDF using PdfExtractor (Facades API) and generate a new PDF that contains the extracted text as a summary.

examples.title: Extract Images from Pages Containing a Keyword
examples.description: Shows how to scan each PDF page for a specific keyword and, when the keyword is found, extract all images from that page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor.

examples.title: Extract Images and Create PDF/A‑2b Document
examples.description: Shows how to extract images from a PDF using PdfExtractor, embed each image as an XObject on a new page, and convert the resulting document to PDF/A‑2b compliance.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Portfolio PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a source PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor and assembling them into a new PDF portfolio where each image occupies its own page.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Sprite Sheet PNG
examples.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF using PdfExtractor and merge them into a single horizontal sprite sheet PNG with PdfConverter.

examples.title: Extract Images from Encrypted PDF using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Shows how to provide a user password to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and extract all images from an encrypted PDF document.

examples.title: Extract Images from First PDF Page to Byte Arrays
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade to pull all images from the first page of a PDF and store each image directly in a byte array for further processing.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Compress PNGs
examples.description: The example demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract images from a PDF, save them as PNG files, and then compress each PNG using GZip for lossless compression.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate CSV Report
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract images from each PDF page, save them as PNG files, and produce a CSV file with image filenames, page numbers, and dimensions.

examples.title: Extract Images from Specific PDF Pages as PNG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure PdfExtractor to extract only images from pages 5‑10 of a PDF and save each extracted image as a PNG file.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Google Cloud Storage
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF and then upload each image to a Google Cloud Storage bucket with public read permissions.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF to ZIP Archive
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images out of a PDF and then package those images into a ZIP file.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor with Automatic Disposal
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor inside a using block to extract all images from a PDF and save them as JPEG files.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF with GUID Filenames
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and save each image with a unique GUID‑based filename to avoid naming collisions.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF to Temporary Folder
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF and save them into a uniquely created temporary directory.

examples.title: Extract Images from a Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to extract all images from a single PDF page by setting the PdfExtractor's StartPage and EndPage to the same value.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate Markdown Gallery
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF, save them as PNG files, and create a Markdown file that displays the images as a gallery.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Perform OCR with OpenAI
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using PdfExtractor and then applying Aspose.Pdf.AI OCR via OpenAI to retrieve hidden text from each image.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF in Original Format
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF while preserving their original file format.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create CSV Manifest
examples.description: The example opens a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracts each image on every page, saves them as PNG files, and generates a CSV file listing the image file name, page number, and dimensions.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF to Base64 JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, convert them to Base64 strings, and save the data with metadata in a JSON file.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Embed into Word Document
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF file and insert them into a DOCX using the Open XML SDK.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Amazon S3
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and uploading each image to an Amazon S3 bucket via the AWS SDK.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Embed in HTML Report
examples.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and embed them as base64 data URIs in an HTML file.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as TIFF
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF and save each one as a lossless TIFF file for archival storage.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF to UNC Network Share
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and saving them to a UNC network share directory.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF to UNC Network Share
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and writing them to a network‑mapped UNC folder.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Validate File Signatures
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saving them to disk, and verifying their integrity by checking magic numbers (file signatures).

examples.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Organize by File Extension
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract embedded attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and save them into subfolders grouped by their original file extensions.

examples.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Rename with Timestamp
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, then save each file with a unique timestamp‑based name.

examples.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Compute SHA-256 Hashes
examples.description: Extracts all file attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, saves each attachment to disk, and calculates a SHA-256 hash to verify its integrity.

examples.title: Extract Attachments from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to extract embedded file attachments from a PDF document and write each one to a specified output folder using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images and Add Watermark
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, apply a semi‑transparent text watermark to each image, and save the results as PNG files.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images and Save as BMP
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and saving them as BMP files while preserving the original resolution and color depth.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images and Return as Base64 JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, converting each image to a Base64 string, and serializing the collection to a JSON array.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images and Build Video Slideshow
examples.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor, saves them as PNG files, and then assembles them into a video slideshow with FFmpeg.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images and Build HTML Gallery
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and generate a simple HTML page that displays the extracted images.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Azure Blob Storage
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF and then upload each image to an Azure Blob container.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images to JPEG (Quality 85)
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF and saving them as JPEG files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter with a JPEG quality setting of 85 to balance file size and clarity.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to S3 with SSE
examples.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor, saves them as temporary PNG files, and uploads each image to an Amazon S3 bucket with server‑side AES‑256 encryption.

examples.title: Extract PDF Pages as PNG Thumbnails
examples.description: Shows how to extract each page of a PDF as a PNG thumbnail with a maximum size of 200 × 200 pixels using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text via Azure Queue Trigger
examples.description: Shows an Azure Function that triggers on a storage queue, downloads a PDF blob, extracts its text with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and uploads the extracted text as a .txt blob.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text Page‑by‑Page with Progress Indicator
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract each PDF page's text into separate files while displaying a real‑time progress percentage.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text Page by Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract the text of each PDF page and save it to separate .txt files.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in Azure Table
examples.description: Shows how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and save the extracted content as an Azure Table entity with the document ID as the partition key.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Compress to GZip
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all text from a PDF and write it directly into a GZipStream, creating a compressed .txt.gz file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in PostgreSQL
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract Unicode text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and insert the extracted content into a PostgreSQL table for searchable indexing.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text to StringBuilder
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF, store it in a StringBuilder for further manipulation, and then write the processed text to a file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text to StringWriter for Logging
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, capture it in a MemoryStream, and write the result to a StringWriter for integration with logging frameworks.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text to Temporary File and Verify Content
examples.description: The example extracts all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, writes it to a temporary Unicode text file, reads the file back, and verifies that the extracted text matches the saved content.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text to UTF-8 File using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and saving it to a UTF-8 encoded text file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text with Cancellation Support
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF page‑by‑page while honoring a CancellationToken to abort the operation.

examples.title: Extract Images Defined in Resources from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set the ImageExtractionMode to DefinedInResources and use PdfExtractor to retrieve and save images embedded as resources in a PDF document.

examples.title: Extract Text and Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract both text and images from a PDF file in a single run.

examples.title: Extract Text from Password-Protected PDF
examples.description: Shows how to supply the owner password to PdfExtractor, decrypt a protected PDF, and extract its text to a file.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF and Encrypt with AES
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and then encrypting the resulting .txt file with AES‑256 CBC using a password‑derived key.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF Byte Array with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read a PDF file into a byte array, bind it to a MemoryStream, and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract the document text and return it as JSON.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF Bytes Using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF stored in a byte array to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extracting its text entirely in memory, and handling platform‑specific GDI+ issues with a fallback PDF.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF Pages with Progress Reporting
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from each page of a PDF while reporting progress to the console.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 Text File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to read a PDF, extract its plain text with UTF‑8 encoding, and save the result to a .txt file.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extract its text, and output the result to the console.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF Using Aspose.Pdf.Facades
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extract its text, and write the result to the console.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDFs Using Aspose PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates a .NET console service that extracts text from PDF files with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, handling input/output directories via environment variables and fallback temporary folders.

examples.title: Extract Text Only from PDF Using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract only the textual content from a PDF while ignoring images by omitting the ExtractImage call.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text to MemoryStream and Generate New PDF
examples.description: Shows how to extract all text from a PDF into a MemoryStream using PdfExtractor, then read the stream to create a new PDF with Aspose.Pdf core API.

examples.title: Handle Errors When Binding a Corrupted PDF with PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to catch specific Aspose.Pdf exceptions thrown when PdfExtractor fails to bind a corrupted PDF file, providing detailed error messages.

examples.title: List Embedded Attachment Names from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF with PdfExtractor, extract its attachments, and retrieve the names of all embedded files without saving them.

examples.title: Parallel Extraction of Images from Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract images from several PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and Task.WhenAll for improved throughput.

examples.title: PdfExtractor Text Extraction Unit Test
examples.description: Shows how to create a temporary PDF with known text, extract that text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and verify the result with an NUnit assertion.

examples.title: Retry PDF Text Extraction with PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor with a retry loop that handles IOException and retries up to three times.

examples.title: Verify ImageExtractionMode Affects Extracted Image Count
examples.description: Creates a PDF with two images and uses PdfExtractor with different ExtractImageMode settings to ensure the extraction mode influences the number of images returned, demonstrated via an NUnit unit test.

examples.title: Add Current Date Header to PDF Using AutoFiller
examples.description: Shows how to generate a PDF from a template with AutoFiller and then add a header containing the current date on every page using PdfFileStamp.

examples.title: Asynchronously Fill PDF Form from XLSX Data
examples.description: The example reads an XLSX file asynchronously, extracts field values, fills a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade, and saves the filled PDF asynchronously.

examples.title: Batch Fill PDF Template with Multiple DataTables
examples.description: Shows how to repeatedly fill a single PDF form template using a list of DataTable objects, producing a separate filled PDF for each data set.

examples.title: Bind PDF Form to AutoFiller and Save
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF form to an Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller instance and save the (potentially unchanged) document to a new file.

examples.title: Configure DataColumn Properties and Fill PDF Form with AutoFiller
examples.description: The example shows how to set DataColumn flags such as ReadOnly and Unique before importing a DataTable into a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller, and how to create a simple PDF template with form fields.

examples.title: Convert Filled PDF to Byte Array Using PdfViewer
examples.description: Shows how to load a filled PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer and return its content as a byte array directly from memory, avoiding any disk writes.

examples.title: Extract PDF Pages with Custom File Names from DataTable
examples.description: Shows how to split a PDF into individual pages using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and name each generated PDF file according to values stored in a DataTable.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Asynchronously with Timeout Cancellation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to fill a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, then save the document asynchronously while aborting the operation if it exceeds a specified timeout via a CancellationToken.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from CSV Data
examples.description: Shows how to read a CSV file into a DataTable, map column names to PDF form field names, and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to fill and save the PDF.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form per DataTable Row and Merge Pages with Logging
examples.description: Demonstrates how to fill a PDF form for each DataTable row using AutoFiller, merge the generated pages into a single document, and log the processed row and page numbers.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Using AutoFiller and DataTable
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF template, import a DataTable whose column names match AcroForm fields, and save the filled PDF using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form and Validate Generated File Size
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to merge a DataTable into a PDF form, save the result, and verify that the output file does not exceed a predefined size limit.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Using AutoFiller and DataTable
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF template, import data from a DataTable (simulating an XLSX source), and generate a filled PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Using AutoFiller and Dispose Resources
examples.description: Demonstrates how to populate a PDF form from a DataTable using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller and automatically release unmanaged resources with a using block.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Using CSV Data with Dynamic Column Mapping
examples.description: Demonstrates loading CSV data into a DataTable, applying a JSON‑based column‑to‑PDF‑field mapping, and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to populate a PDF form.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form with DataTable and Handle Exceptions
examples.description: The example shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to bind a PDF template, import data from a DataTable, and save the filled document while handling common PDF and file related exceptions.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Using DataTable with Custom Columns
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF form, add matching DataTable columns (including extra custom columns) via DataColumnCollection, populate rows, and import the data into the form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller.

examples.title: Generate PDF Page‑to‑DataTable Summary Report
examples.description: Creates a PDF (or a blank one if missing), populates a DataTable with identifiers for each page, and writes a text report mapping page numbers to the corresponding DataTable row IDs using Aspose.Pdf and its Facade class.

examples.title: Generate One‑Page PDFs from DataTable Rows
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF form template, filling its fields with values from each DataTable row, saving each filled document as a separate one‑page PDF, and verifying the page count.

examples.title: Generate PDFs from Multiple CSV Worksheets using AutoFiller
examples.description: The example reads each CSV file in a folder, converts it to a DataTable, and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to populate a PDF form template, producing a separate PDF for each worksheet.

examples.title: Map DataTable Columns to PDF Form Fields with AutoFiller
examples.description: Shows how to rename DataTable columns to match PDF form field identifiers and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to automatically fill the PDF form.

examples.title: Merge Multiple Filled PDFs Generated from DataTables
examples.description: The example fills a PDF form template with data from several DataTables, saves each filled document, and then concatenates all PDFs into a single consolidated file.

examples.title: Password‑Protect a Filled PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an already filled PDF and applying user and owner passwords with specific privileges using the PdfFileSecurity facade.

examples.title: Process PDF with Temporary Folder and Disk Buffer
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use a unique temporary folder and disk buffering while processing large PDFs with Aspose.Pdf, including flattening, saving with intermediate files, and splitting into single‑page PDFs.

examples.title: Save Filled PDF While Preserving Layout
examples.description: Shows how to bind a filled PDF using the Form facade and save it to a new file, keeping the original layout unchanged.

examples.title: Split Filled PDF into Single-Page PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a filled PDF and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to split it into individual one‑page PDF files, naming each file with a page‑number placeholder.

examples.title: Stream Large CSV Data into PDF Form Using AutoFiller
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read a large CSV file row‑by‑row into a DataTable and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to merge the data into a PDF form without exhausting memory.

examples.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields Against DataTable Columns
examples.description: Shows how to check that every required AcroForm field in a PDF has a matching column in a DataTable before filling the form, and then fills the fields if validation passes.

examples.title: Add Digital Signature Field and Sign PDF with Appearance
examples.description: Shows how to add a signature field named "DigitalSignature" to a PDF, assign a visual appearance image, and sign the field using a PKCS#1 certificate with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Email Validation JavaScript to PDF Form Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to the Email text field of a PDF to validate the email format on blur (focus loss) using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor facade.

examples.title: Add Email Validation to PDF Form Field
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormEditor to attach a JavaScript validation script to a PDF form field, enforcing proper email syntax.

examples.title: Add Gender Radio Button Group to PDF Form
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a radio button group named "Gender" with options Male, Female, Other and set a default selection using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to A4 Page Size

examples.title: Batch Set Fade Transition for PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a fade (dissolve) transition with a two‑second duration to all pages of a PDF, creating a slideshow effect using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Center Content Horizontally on Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor to horizontally center the existing content on page 2 of a PDF document.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to center the content of page 5 horizontally and set its display duration to 4 seconds using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.description: Shows how to apply multiple page property changes—rotation, page size, and zoom—sequentially using PdfPageEditor and save the modified PDF.

examples.title: Convert PDF Page Orientation to Landscape (A4)
examples.description: Shows how to change a PDF's page orientation from portrait to landscape by setting the PageSize to A4 landscape dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.description: Shows how to change a PDF page's orientation from portrait to landscape by swapping the width and height via the PageSize property and rotating the page so the content remains upright.

examples.title: Create ContentsResizeParameters with Uniform Margins
examples.description: Shows how to instantiate a ContentsResizeParameters object with 5‑point absolute margins on all sides using the static Margins method.

examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor to assign transition effects and display durations to each page, producing a PDF that plays as a slideshow.

examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, setting a zoom factor and rotating all pages, applying the changes, and saving the edited document to a new file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF with PdfPageEditor, applying a modification (zoom), and saving the edited document to a separate file while keeping the original unchanged.

examples.title: Extract and Rotate Selected PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to extract specific pages from a PDF, rotate them, and save the modified pages as a new PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.title: Get Rotation Angle of a PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with PdfPageEditor and retrieve the rotation angle of page 4.

examples.description: Demonstrates catching InvalidValueFormatException when assigning an unsupported rotation value to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor and falling back to a valid rotation.

examples.description: Shows how to create a ContentsResizeParameters object that combines percentage‑based and absolute margins, then apply it to resize specific PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Left Align Content of Page Two in PDF

examples.title: Log PDF Page Dimensions and Rotation Before and After Editing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to capture page width, height, and rotation values of a PDF before and after applying a rotation edit, and writes the audit information to a text file.

examples.description: Shows how to change various page properties using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and record each modification to a log file for audit and debugging.

examples.description: Shows how to add uniform margins to multiple PDF files and then concatenate them into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Resize Specific PDF Page to Letter Size with PdfPageEditor
examples.description: Shows how to change the size of a single page (page 6) in a PDF to Letter dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor to resize page contents by applying different left, right, top, and bottom margins, with fallback PDF creation if the source file is missing.

examples.description: Shows how to change the size of all pages in a PDF to A3 using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

examples.description: Iterates through a folder of PDF files and applies a standardized user password to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to update both the user and owner passwords of a PDF file in a single call using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade.

examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply AES‑256 encryption to a PDF while specifying custom user privileges such as printing and content extraction using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF from Byte Array using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a byte array, encrypt it with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity, and return the encrypted PDF as a byte array.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4‑40 using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt an existing PDF file with the RC4‑40 algorithm and a user password using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSecurity facade.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF Stream with RC4‑40 using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF provided as a stream using RC4‑40 encryption with Aspose.Pdf.Facades and return the encrypted content as a new stream.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF and Save to MemoryStream
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity and write the encrypted document directly to a MemoryStream for network transmission.

examples.title: Encrypt PDFs with Performance Timing
examples.description: Demonstrates encrypting multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity while measuring and logging the time taken for each encryption operation.

examples.title: Folder Watcher PDF Encryption Service
examples.description: Demonstrates how to monitor a directory for new PDF files, encrypt them with user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf, and move the encrypted files to a secure archive.

examples.description: Scans a directory of PDF files, uses PdfFileInfo to determine if each file is encrypted, and writes a tab‑delimited report showing the file name, encryption status, and algorithm (or unknown).

examples.title: Get PDF Encryption Algorithm using Aspose.Pdf

examples.title: Load PDF and Verify Page Count Using Facade API
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and verify successful loading by checking the document's page count.

examples.title: Generate PDF Encryption Summary CSV
examples.description: Scans a directory of PDF files, determines each file's encryption status and document privileges using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and writes the results to a CSV summary file.

examples.title: Remove Usage Rights from Signed PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF, detect extended usage rights, remove them, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Remove Usage Rights from PDF and Verify Removal
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, remove its usage rights, verify the removal using ContainsUsageRights, and save the resulting document.

examples.title: Set PDF Privileges with Exception Propagation

examples.title: Set PDF Privileges to Allow Printing and Disallow Copying
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to set document privileges on a PDF, enabling printing while preventing content copying, and saving the protected file.

examples.title: Check for Absence of Signatures in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature to confirm that a PDF contains no signatures and that VerifySigned returns false for a non‑existent signature.

examples.title: Create Custom PDF Signature Appearance Without Default Caption
examples.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF with a visible signature using Aspose.Pdf and hide the default "Digitally signed by" label by setting a custom appearance.

examples.title: Digitally Sign First Page of PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a PdfFileSignature, bind a PDF, set a certificate, add a visible digital signature to page 1, and save the signed document.

examples.title: Extract Certificate Details from PDF Signature Fields
examples.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF, enumerate its signature fields, and retrieve the associated X.509 certificate to read the issuer and expiration date.

examples.title: Extract and Log Signature Certificate Serial Number
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF, verify it contains digital signatures, retrieve each signature's X.509 certificate, and log the certificate's serial number for audit purposes.

examples.title: Extract Signature Images from PDF and Embed in HTML Report
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature to extract digital signature images from a PDF and embed them as Base64 images in an HTML report.

examples.title: Extract Signing Certificate from PDF Signature Field
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, bind it to PdfFileSignature, extract the signing certificate from the 'LegalSignature' field, and save it as a .cer file.

examples.title: Extract Signature Image and Save as PNG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract the image from a PDF signature field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and convert it to a PNG file.

examples.title: List PDF Signature Reason and Location
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, retrieve all signature names, and extract each signature's reason and location for auditing purposes.

examples.title: List Signature Names in a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF document to the PdfFileSignature facade and retrieve the names of all active signatures.

examples.title: Locale‑Specific PDF Signature Appearance
examples.description: Demonstrates signing a PDF with Aspose.Pdf using a PKCS7 signature and customizing the visual appearance with localized labels for German, Spanish, and Japanese cultures.

examples.title: Log PDF Signature Verification Results to JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates how to verify digital signatures in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and write each signature's name and validation status to a structured JSON file.

examples.title: Generate PDF Signature Verification Report
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read digital signatures from a PDF, verify each signature, and create a new PDF report summarizing the signers and verification results using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove All Signatures from a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade to enumerate and delete every digital signature in a PDF and then save a clean copy.

examples.title: Remove All Signatures from PDFs Recursively
examples.description: Shows how to recursively find PDF files in a directory and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to strip all digital signatures, saving unsigned copies.

examples.title: Remove PDF Signature with Missing-Field Handling
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove a specific digital signature from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, while gracefully handling the case where the signature does not exist.

examples.title: Remove Signature from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, remove a signature named 'ApprovalSignature' using Aspose.Pdf, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Remove Existing Signatures and Re‑sign PDF with a New Certificate
examples.description: Demonstrates how to clear all existing signatures from a PDF and apply a new digital signature using a different certificate with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Retry PDF Signing When File Is Locked
examples.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades with a retry mechanism that handles file‑locking errors caused by another process.

examples.title: Sign and Verify PDF Using PdfFileSignature
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF with a PKCS#1 certificate using PdfFileSignature and then immediately verify the signature's authenticity.

examples.title: Sign PDF with French Caption Using SignatureCustomAppearance
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF and set the signature appearance caption to French by configuring the SignatureCustomAppearance locale. The example uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades to apply a visible PKCS#1 signature.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Hidden Signature Appearance
examples.description: Demonstrates digitally signing a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while completely hiding the signature appearance, keeping the signature cryptographically valid.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Semi-Transparent Background Appearance
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and configure a custom signature appearance with a semi‑transparent background color for better readability.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Suppress Signature Text
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and hide the default location, reason, and contact information by setting those properties to empty strings before signing.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Visible Signature on Last Page
examples.description: Shows how to apply a visible digital signature to the bottom‑right corner of the last page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and the PdfFileSignature facade.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Custom Appearance (Foreground Image & Background Color)
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure a SignatureCustomAppearance with a foreground image and background color, then apply a PKCS#1 digital signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Sign PDF with PFX Certificate using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF document using a password‑protected PFX certificate with Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Reason and Location
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, setting the signature reason and location before saving the signed document.

examples.title: Verify Multiple Signatures in a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF, retrieve all signature names, and verify each signature using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Verify Named PDF Signature Using VerifySigned
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, checks for any digital signatures, searches for a signature named 'ContractSigner', and verifies its validity using the VerifySigned method of PdfFileSignature.

examples.title: Verify PDF Signature Field Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, binding it with PdfFileSignature, and verifying the integrity of a specific digital signature field named "ManagerSignature".

examples.title: Add Background Text Stamp with 30% Opacity
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent text stamp behind the content of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Background Watermark Stamp to Specific PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a background watermark stamp using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and apply it to pages 2 through 5 of a PDF document.

examples.title: Add Creation Date Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to read a PDF's creation date and place it as a text stamp in the top‑left corner of each page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Custom Border Stamp to PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to use PdfContentEditor to create a square annotation with a custom border thickness and color to highlight a specific area in a PDF document.

examples.title: Add Disclaimer Stamp to First Page of PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp and Stamp to overlay a disclaimer PDF onto the first page of a target PDF document.

examples.title: Add Dynamic Text Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a TextStamp with interpolated date and author, configuring its appearance, adding it to the first page, and saving the document.

examples.title: Add File Name Header Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a text stamp in the header of each PDF page that automatically shows the document's file name using the {FileName} placeholder.

examples.title: Add Footer Date Stamp to Last PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to place a footer stamp with the current date (MM-dd-yyyy) on the last page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Footer Stamp 10 Points Above Bottom Edge
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a footer stamp exactly 10 points above the bottom edge of each page by configuring stamp margins with PdfFileStamp.

examples.title: Add Footer with Automatic Page Count to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use PdfFileStamp to add a footer containing the {page_count} placeholder, which Aspose.Pdf replaces with the total number of pages when the document is saved.

examples.title: Add Header Stamp to All PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through each page, and add a centered header stamp containing a company name using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Logo and Confidential Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to place a company logo image together with bold 'Confidential' text as a semi‑transparent background stamp on every page of a PDF document.

examples.title: Add Lower‑Roman Page Numbers to Odd Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to stamp lower‑case Roman numerals as page numbers on only the odd pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Multi-Line Text Watermark to PDF Using FormattedText
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a multi-line formatted text watermark with Aspose.Pdf.Facades and applying it to every page of a PDF document.

examples.title: Add Multi‑Line Watermark with Different Font Styles using PdfFileMend
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a three‑line watermark on every PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.FormattedText and the AddNewLineText method to apply distinct font styles and spacing.

examples.title: Add Page Number Stamp with Arabic Numerals
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade to add sequential page numbers formatted as Arabic numerals to every page of a PDF document.

examples.title: Add Page Number Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp to add a dynamic page number stamp to each page of a PDF and save the stamped document.

examples.title: Add QR Code and Text Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a QR‑code image together with descriptive text on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades stamping APIs.

examples.title: Add Repeating Background Image Watermark to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use a single Stamp instance to place a semi‑transparent background image on every page of a PDF, creating a repeated watermark effect.

examples.title: Add Right-Aligned Logo Stamp to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to place an image stamp (logo) on every page of a PDF and align it to the right margin using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Rotated Image Stamp to First Page of PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to batch‑process PDF files in a directory and apply a semi‑transparent, 45‑degree rotated image stamp to the first page of each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent PNG Background Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to place a semi‑transparent PNG image as a background stamp that covers the entire page of a PDF document.

examples.title: Add Translucent Text Watermark to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to create a 50% opaque text stamp and apply it as a watermark on every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Transparent CONFIDENTIAL Text Stamp to Selected PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent CONFIDENTIAL text stamp on specific pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Apply Image Stamp to All PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to use PdfFileStamp and Stamp to add a single image stamp to every page of a PDF efficiently in one operation.

examples.title: Apply Image Stamp to PDF with Overlay Control
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF in memory, generating an image stamp, binding both via streams, setting the stamp to overlay existing content (IsBackground = false), and saving the stamped PDF.

examples.title: Apply Image Stamp to PDFs and Save to New Folder
examples.description: Demonstrates loading PDF files from a directory, applying an image stamp to every page with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and saving the stamped PDFs to a separate folder while preserving the original file names.

examples.title: Apply Multi-Line Colored Header Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a multi‑line header to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, with each line rendered in a different font color.

examples.title: Apply Multi-Line Text Stamp with Custom Line Spacing

examples.title: Apply Multi-Line Watermark with Custom Line Height

examples.title: Apply PDF Page Stamp as Background to All Pages

examples.title: Apply Rotated Image Stamp to Bottom Right of PDF Pages

examples.title: Apply Rotated Text Stamp to Odd Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a 30‑degree rotated red CONFIDENTIAL text stamp to the left margin of every odd‑numbered page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Apply Rotating Stamps to Each PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a text stamp to every page of a PDF and rotating it based on the page index using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Apply Stamp to Specific PDF Pages Using Aspose.Pdf.Facades
examples.description: Shows how to add a formatted text stamp to pages 1, 5, and 10 of a PDF by directly specifying the page indices with PdfFileMend.

examples.title: Apply Text Stamp to Even Pages of a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a text stamp only to even-numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Batch Add Multi‑Line Watermark to PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDF files and apply the same multi‑line watermark stamp to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.description: Shows how to enumerate PDF files in a UNC folder and apply a rotated page from another PDF as a background stamp to every document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Combine Image and Text into a Single PDF Stamp

examples.title: Create Multi-Page PDF Stamp from Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates combining several PDF files as stamps and applying them to a target PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade.

examples.description: Demonstrates loading a TrueType font from a file and using it to create a text stamp for branding, which is applied to every page of a PDF document.

examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp together with a Stamp to place the first page of a cover PDF behind the content of another PDF, creating a merged document.

examples.title: Rotate Text Stamp 45 Degrees in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a TextStamp, configuring its appearance, rotating it 45° around its centre, and applying it to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Rotate Text Stamp by 90 Degrees
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a formatted text stamp, setting its Rotation property to 90°, and applying it to a PDF using the PdfFileStamp facade.

examples.title: Stamp PDF with External Template on Specific Page

examples.title: Add Background Image to All PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to overlay a PNG background image on every page of a PDF by retrieving page dimensions and using the PdfFileMend facade to add the image.

examples.title: Add Header Image to PDF Files
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp in a console app to insert a header image into one or more PDF documents.

examples.title: Add Image and Text to PDF with Audit Logging
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend to insert an image and formatted text onto specific PDF pages and log each operation with timestamps for auditing.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF with Proper Resource Cleanup
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, add an image stamp to a page, save the changes, and guarantee resource release using a try‑finally block that calls Close() on PdfFileMend.

examples.title: Add Image to PDF with Format Validation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to validate an image's file format before using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend to insert the image into a PDF page.

examples.title: Add Images to PDF with Error Handling
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add multiple images to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileMend facade while handling missing files and exceptions for each image.

examples.title: Add Multi‑Line Text with Custom Line Spacing to Page 3
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf Facades to insert a multi‑line text paragraph with custom line spacing into the left margin of the third page of a PDF document.

examples.title: Add PNG Image to PDF Page Using PdfFileMend
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF with PdfFileMend, insert a PNG image onto a specific page at given coordinates, and save the result as a new PDF.

examples.title: Add Promotional Text to Specific PDF Pages

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent Image and Text Watermark to PDF

examples.title: Add TIFF Image to Last PDF Page with PdfFileMend

examples.title: Add Word‑Wrap Footer to All PDF Pages

examples.title: Asynchronously Add Image to PDF Using PdfFileMend
examples.description: Shows how to modify a PDF on a background thread by adding an image to the first page with PdfFileMend wrapped in Task.Run for non‑blocking execution.

examples.title: Batch Add Company Logo to PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDF files and stamp a company logo PNG onto the top‑right corner of each document using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs with Page and Index Naming
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through multiple PDF files, extract all images per page, and save them with filenames that include the original PDF name, page number, and image index.

examples.title: Extract Images from Specific PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to extract images from pages 2 through 5 of a PDF and save them as PNG files in a temporary directory using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF to PNG
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF and save each as an individual PNG file.

examples.title: Insert PNG Signature on Every PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfFileMend to add a PNG signature image to the bottom‑left corner of each page in a PDF document.

examples.title: Overlay Semi-Transparent GIF onto PDF using CompositingParameters
examples.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent GIF over an existing PNG in a PDF by using PdfFileMend with CompositingParameters and a blend mode.

examples.title: Remove All Images from a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to delete every image from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor and save the modified document to a new file.

examples.title: Remove Image from Specific PDF Page

examples.title: Replace JPEG Image with BMP Using PdfContentEditor
examples.description: Shows how to replace an existing image on the first page of a PDF with a higher‑resolution BMP file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Replace Low-Resolution Images with High-Resolution PNGs in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to loop through PDF pages and images using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and replace each low‑resolution image with a corresponding high‑resolution PNG file.

examples.title: Verify PDF Size Increase After Adding Image
examples.description: The example creates a blank PDF, adds a PNG image to the first page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend, and asserts that the PDF byte size grows, demonstrating how to validate image insertion with unit tests.

examples.title: Add Minimal XMP Metadata to PDF When Missing

examples.title: Add Timestamp to PDF XMP Metadata
examples.description: Shows how to insert an ISO‑8601 ModifyDate timestamp into a PDF's XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfXmpMetadata and save the document.

examples.title: Bind PDF from Byte Array to PdfXmpMetadata and Retrieve XMP
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF in memory, load it from a byte array, bind it to the PdfXmpMetadata facade, and extract the XMP metadata as XML.

examples.title: Check for XMP Metadata in a PDF

examples.title: Clear XMP Metadata from PDF while Preserving Header
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove all XMP metadata entries from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, leaving only the mandatory PDF schema header.

examples.description: Demonstrates generating a new PDF, registering XMP namespaces, adding custom XMP metadata entries, and saving the document with the embedded XMP block using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF with Error Handling
examples.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF using PdfFileSecurity, detecting encryption, providing a password to open the document, decrypting it, and handling errors such as invalid passwords.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF, Update CreatorTool Metadata, and Re‑encrypt
examples.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt a password‑protected PDF, modify its Creator (or CreatorTool) metadata, and then re‑encrypt it with new permissions using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Export PDF XMP Metadata to JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and convert it to a JSON file for integration with non‑XML systems.

examples.title: Export XMP Metadata from PDF to Side‑car File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file, retrieve its XMP metadata as a byte array, and write it to a separate .xmp side‑car file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file to a PdfXmpMetadata facade, retrieve the XMP metadata as an XML byte array, and save it for inspection.

examples.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, retrieve its XMP metadata as XML, and read common properties such as creator, title, and creation date using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF to Dictionary
examples.description: Shows how to read XMP metadata from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf and return it as a case‑insensitive dictionary of string key/value pairs.

examples.title: HTML to PDF Conversion with Configurable BaseUrl Injection
examples.description: Converts an HTML file to PDF using Aspose.Pdf and demonstrates how to disable BaseUrl injection via a configuration switch for test environments.

examples.title: Insert Pages and Update XMP Metadata in PDF

examples.title: List XMP Namespaces in a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades and enumerate all namespace URIs defined in the metadata XML.

examples.title: Log Original XMP Metadata from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract the original XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save it to an XML file for audit purposes before any modifications are made.

examples.title: Log XMP Metadata Size Before and After Modification
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF to the XMP metadata facade, read the XMP block size, add a custom property, log the size before and after the change, and save the updated PDF.

examples.title: Modify and Save XMP Metadata in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF with PdfXmpMetadata, adding standard and custom XMP properties, registering a custom namespace, and saving the updated PDF file.

examples.title: Modify XMP Metadata Property in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting XMP metadata from a PDF, updating a specific XML node (e.g., dc:creator), and writing the modified metadata back to the PDF.

examples.title: Preserve XMP Metadata When Splitting PDF into Single Pages
examples.description: Shows how to extract the original XMP metadata from a multi‑page PDF and re‑apply it to each single‑page PDF generated by splitting the document.

examples.title: Read XMP Metadata from a Highly Compressed PDF
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, applies high compression using OptimizationOptions, saves the compressed file, and then reads and prints the XMP metadata from the compressed PDF using the PdfXmpMetadata facade.

examples.title: Read XMP Metadata from Large PDF and Measure Performance
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with the PdfXmpMetadata facade, extracting its XMP metadata as a byte array, and timing the operation.

examples.title: Read XMP Metadata from PDF via UNC Path
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF located on a network share using a UNC path and extract its XMP metadata as XML using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Refresh CreatorTool Metadata for PDFs Nightly
examples.description: Shows how to scan a folder of PDF files and update the Creator (CreatorTool) metadata and modification date using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, suitable for running as a scheduled nightly job.

examples.title: Remove Nickname Element from PDF XMP Metadata

examples.title: Remove XMP Metadata from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to delete the entire XMP metadata block from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save a metadata‑free document.

examples.title: Replace PDF XMP Metadata from External File
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read an external .xmp file, replace the PDF's existing XMP metadata block, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Retrieve XMP Metadata from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfXmpMetadata and extract its raw XMP XML as a UTF-8 string.

examples.title: Set BaseURL in PDF XMP Metadata
examples.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF, add the BaseURL property to its XMP metadata, and save the updated file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set CreatorTool in PDF XMP Metadata

examples.title: Set PDF Creator Metadata with Default Value
examples.description: Shows how to assign the Creator metadata of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with a configurable default applied when no creator string is provided.

examples.title: Set PDF Creator Metadata via Extension Method
examples.description: Shows a reusable extension method that adds or updates the Creator metadata field of an Aspose.Pdf Document, persisting the change when the document is saved.

examples.title: Set XMP Nickname Property in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add or update the xmp:Nickname property in a PDF's XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Store Unicode Nickname in PDF Embedded File Specification
examples.description: Demonstrates how to assign a Unicode nickname to an embedded file in a PDF and verify that it is persisted using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Update Multiple XMP Metadata Properties Atomically
examples.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF, adding several XMP metadata fields, and saving the changes in a single atomic transaction using Aspose.Pdf's PdfXmpMetadata facade.

examples.title: Update PDF Creator Tool Metadata in a Folder
examples.description: Shows how to batch‑process PDFs in a directory and set the Creator (CreatorTool) XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo.

examples.title: Update XMP BaseURL in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
