examples.title: Update XMP Property in a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file, add or update an XMP metadata property, and save the modified PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Validate Mandatory XMP Metadata Before Publishing PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's XMP metadata facade to verify required XMP fields and abort the publishing process if any are missing.

examples.title: Validate XMP Metadata Against XSD Schema
examples.description: Shows how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfXmpMetadata facade and validate it against an XSD schema with an XML schema validator.

examples.title: Verify BasePath Escaping in XfaParserOptions
examples.description: Demonstrates a unit test that ensures the BasePath property of XfaParserOptions is correctly escaped for URLs containing spaces and non‑ASCII characters, using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Add Auto‑Close JavaScript to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates embedding JavaScript in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf to automatically close the document after a specified timeout.

examples.title: Add Auto‑Save JavaScript to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates embedding a document‑level JavaScript action that automatically saves the PDF at defined intervals using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Custom Metadata to ZUGFeRD PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a ZUGFeRD PDF with Aspose.Pdf, add custom metadata entries such as project code and department, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Add Expiry Date JavaScript Action to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed a document‑level JavaScript open action that checks the current date against a specified expiry date and closes the PDF if it has expired.

examples.title: Add File Attachment Annotation to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external PDF file to a PDF document as a file‑attachment annotation, including a description and MIME type settings.

examples.title: Add JavaScript Open Action to Jump to Page 5
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set a JavaScript open action in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so the document automatically navigates to page five when opened.

examples.title: Add JavaScript Password Prompt and Encryption to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to embed JavaScript that asks for a password when the PDF is opened and then encrypt the document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add JavaScript Total Calculation to PDF Form
examples.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript action to a PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf to sum line‑item values and display the total.

examples.title: Add Page-Level JavaScript Alert to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to embed a JavaScript action on a specific PDF page that displays an alert when the page becomes visible, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add QR Code Barcode Using Low-Level Operators
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a QR code barcode field at defined coordinates, inserts it into the form, and demonstrates low‑level graphics‑state operators (GSave/GRestore) before saving the document.

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent Watermark Behind PDF Content
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a low‑level WatermarkArtifact behind existing page content on every page of a PDF and make it semi‑transparent using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add XMP Metadata for PDF/A Compliance
examples.description: Shows how to embed required XMP metadata (creation date, creator tool, producer, document ID) into a PDF and convert it to PDF/A‑1b using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add ZUGFeRD attachment and validate PDF/A‑3A compliance
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF/A‑3 document, embeds a ZUGFeRD XML invoice as an attachment, saves the updated PDF, and runs a PDF/A‑3A compliance check, writing a validation report.

examples.title: Attach Multiple Files with Descriptions to a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add several file attachment annotations to a PDF, each with its own MIME type, description and icon using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Attach ZUGFeRD XML to PDF and Convert to PDF/A‑3B
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, embed a ZUGFeRD XML file as an attached file, optionally convert the document to PDF/A‑3B for compliance, and save the resulting PDF.

examples.title: Auto‑Print PDF on Open with JavaScript Action
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed a JavaScript action in a PDF that automatically opens the print dialog when the document is loaded, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through all PDF files in a folder, convert each page to a high‑resolution JPEG, and save the images with names derived from the original PDF file.

examples.title: Batch Generate ZUGFeRD‑Compliant PDFs from CSV
examples.description: Shows how to read invoice data from a CSV file, embed the matching ZUGFeRD XML as an attachment, convert the document to PDF/A‑3U, and save the resulting PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Apply Password Protection to PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt all PDF files in a folder with the same user and owner passwords, applying specific permissions and handling errors.

examples.title: Batch PDF Text Extraction and Searchable Index
examples.description: Extracts text from all PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf and stores the content in an in‑memory dictionary for quick case‑insensitive search.

examples.title: Calculate Order Total in PDF Form
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read quantity and price fields from a PDF form, compute the total amount, and write the result back into a form field using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Change PDF Line Width from 1 to 3 Points
examples.description: Shows how to iterate PDF page operators and modify SetLineWidth operators to change line width from 1 point to 3 points using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Combine Multiple Graphs on a Single PDF Page (2x2 Grid)
examples.description: Creates a PDF with four Aspose.Pdf Graph objects arranged in a two‑by‑two grid on one page, showing how to position graphs, add shapes, titles, and handle platform‑specific saving.

examples.title: Compress PDF Images and Optimize Resources
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's OptimizationOptions and ImageCompressionOptions to compress and resize images, remove unused objects, and apply other optimizations to reduce PDF file size while maintaining visual quality.

examples.title: Convert PDF Page to High-Resolution PNG
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, setting a 300 DPI resolution, and converting the first page to a PNG image.

examples.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Layout Preservation
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, configure DocSaveOptions to keep the original layout, fonts, and tables, and save the document as a DOCX file.

examples.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Embedded Base64 Images
examples.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF document to a single HTML file using Aspose.Pdf while embedding all resources and raster images as Base64‑encoded PNGs inside SVG wrappers.

examples.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to load a PDF document and convert each page into a multi‑page TIFF file with custom resolution and TIFF settings.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-2b Compliance
examples.description: Loads a PDF file, converts it to PDF/A‑2b archival format using Aspose.Pdf, and saves the compliant document.

examples.title: Convert PDF with ZUGFeRD attachment to PDF/A‑3U
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF that contains a ZUGFeRD XML attachment, converting it to PDF/A‑3U format while preserving the embedded data, and saving the result.

examples.title: Create Bar Chart PDF with Custom Colors and Axis Labels
examples.description: The example generates a PDF containing a bar chart using Aspose.Pdf's Graph API, drawing axes, bars with custom colors, and adding category labels on the X‑axis.

examples.title: Create PDF with Signature Field and JavaScript Validation
examples.description: Shows how to add a digital signature field to a PDF and attach a JavaScript action that validates the signature when the field is signed using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create PDF Table of Contents with Clickable Outlines
examples.description: The example loads an existing PDF, enables auto‑tagging, creates a TOC element, inserts a dedicated TOC page, and configures it to show page numbers and copy entries to the document outlines (bookmarks).

examples.title: Create ZUGFeRD‑Compliant Invoice PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a readable PDF invoice template, embed ZUGFeRD XML data, convert the document to PDF/A‑3 ZUGFeRD format, and save the compliant PDF.

examples.title: Digitally Sign PDF with PFX Certificate and Timestamp
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a signature field, applying a PKCS#7 digital signature from a PFX file, adding an RFC‑3161 timestamp, and saving the signed document.

examples.title: Digitally Sign ZUGFeRD PDF with Timestamp
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a ZUGFeRD PDF, adding a signature field, applying a PKCS#7 digital signature from a PFX file, and attaching a timestamp from a TSA service, then saving the signed document.

examples.title: Draw Pie Chart with Low-Level PDF Operators
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf low‑level drawing operators to create a colored pie chart that visualizes sales distribution.

examples.title: Draw a Star Shape with Low-Level PDF Operators
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert low-level PDF drawing operators to render a custom 5-pointed star at specified coordinates on an existing PDF document.

examples.title: Embed Audio with JavaScript Playback in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to embed an MP3 as a sound annotation in a PDF and attach a JavaScript action that plays the audio automatically when the page opens using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Embed Custom TrueType Font in PDF with Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a TrueType font, embedding it in a PDF, drawing a simple graph shape, and adding a text label that uses the embedded font.

examples.title: Embed Vector Graphic in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph container, adding rectangle, ellipse, and line vector shapes, and embedding the vector graphic directly into a PDF page with cross‑platform save handling.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption with separate user and owner passwords, setting basic permissions, and saving the protected document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Form‑Fill Only Permissions
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply security that permits only form filling while blocking editing, printing, and content extraction, and save the encrypted file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Embedded Attachment
examples.description: Shows how to attach a file to a PDF and encrypt the whole document (including the attachment) with AES‑256 using user and owner passwords.

examples.title: Encrypt ZUGFeRD PDF with User and Owner Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a ZUGFeRD PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords and specific permissions, then saving the encrypted file.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and export all its annotations to an XFDF file for external processing or archiving.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, export its interactive form fields to a JSON file, and optionally display the generated JSON.

examples.title: Export Selected PDF Pages to Separate Files
examples.description: Shows how to extract specific pages from a PDF and save each page as an individual PDF file while preserving the original page size and orientation using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF Preserving Original Format
examples.description: The example opens a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page, extracts embedded images, detects their format, and saves them with the original resolution and file extension.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF with Line Breaks Preserved
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all textual content from a PDF while retaining line breaks and spacing using Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber and TextExtractionOptions.

examples.title: Extract and Validate ZUGFeRD XML from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to locate an embedded ZUGFeRD XML file inside a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract its content, and validate it against the official ZUGFeRD XSD schema.

examples.title: Extract ZUGFeRD XML from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate the embedded ZUGFeRD XML attachment, and save it as a local file.

examples.title: Generate Invoices with Sales Graphs
examples.description: Shows how to batch create PDF invoices from a template, add customer and amount text, and embed a simple sales chart using Aspose.Pdf's Graph API.

examples.title: Generate PNG Thumbnails for PDF Pages
examples.description: Creates 150x150 PNG preview images for each page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's ThumbnailDevice.

examples.title: Hide Toolbar and Menu Bar in PDF via JavaScript
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set PDF viewer preferences to hide the toolbar and menu bar by assigning a JavaScript open action and using the corresponding document properties.

examples.title: Import FDF Data into PDF and Flatten Form
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, importing field values from an FDF file using Aspose.Pdf's FdfReader, flattening the form, and saving the resulting PDF.

examples.title: Create Line Graph with Multiple Stroke Styles
examples.description: Shows how to generate a PDF line graph with three data series, each using a different stroke style (solid, dashed, dotted) using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: List PDF Attachments and Their Sizes
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, detect embedded files, and print each attachment's name and byte size.

examples.title: List Document and Page JavaScript Actions in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to enumerate both document‑level and page‑level JavaScript actions (OnOpen/OnClose) in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Merge Multiple PDFs Preserving Bookmarks
examples.description: Demonstrates how to combine several PDF files into a single document using Aspose.Pdf while retaining the original bookmarks and outline hierarchy.

examples.title: Populate PDF Form from JSON and Flatten
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, importing form field values from a JSON file, flattening the form to make fields read‑only, and saving the resulting PDF.

examples.title: Print PDF Page Range to Network Printer with Duplex and Custom Paper Size
examples.description: Demonstrates how to send a specific range of PDF pages to a network printer, configuring duplex mode, custom paper dimensions, and printer settings using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Print PDF Silently to Default Printer
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer to send a PDF file directly to the default printer without showing any print dialog.

examples.title: Read Custom PDF Metadata and Log for Auditing
examples.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracts user‑defined metadata entries from the DocumentInfo dictionary, and writes them to a text file for audit purposes.

examples.title: Remove Background Graphics Operators from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF pages, identify fill and stroke operators that create background graphics, and delete them from the content stream using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove JavaScript and Embedded Files from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to delete document‑level, page‑level, and annotation JavaScript actions and file attachment annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove Specific Attachment from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to delete a named embedded file from a PDF while keeping other attachments using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove ZUGFeRD Attachment from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, find embedded files whose name contains "ZUGFeRD", delete those attachments, and save the resulting document.

examples.title: Render PDF Page to PNG with High‑Quality Anti‑Aliasing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, configure RenderingOptions for high‑quality interpolation, and export a page as a PNG image with smoother lines and curves using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace Text in PDF Using ShowText Operators
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate low‑level ShowText (Tj) operators, replace a specific string, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set JavaScript Open Action to Navigate to Page 10
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a JavaScript open action to a PDF that automatically jumps to page 10 when the document is opened, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Author Metadata Dynamically
examples.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve the current system user and assign it to the Author property of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then save the updated document.

examples.title: Set PDF Creation and Modification Dates
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, assigning the current timestamp to its creation and modification metadata, and saving the updated document.

examples.title: Set PDF Document Language for Accessibility
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, setting the primary language (e.g., en-US) via tagged content to improve screen‑reader accessibility, and saving the updated document.

examples.title: Set PDF Title, Author, and Custom Invoice Number
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, assign standard metadata (Title and Author), add a custom metadata entry for the invoice number, ensure the document has a page, and save it.

examples.title: Set PDF Permissions to Allow Printing Only
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, granting only printing permission while restricting content extraction and annotation modifications.

examples.title: Split PDF into Separate Page PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save each page as an individual PDF file.

examples.title: Subset Custom Font and Use Low‑Level PDF Operators
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a TrueType font, embedding and subsetting it to keep only used glyphs, adding text with the custom font, and inserting low‑level graphics state operators (q/Q) into a PDF.

examples.title: Toggle Form Field Visibility with JavaScript in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a checkbox and a text field to a PDF and using a JavaScript action to hide or show the text field based on the checkbox state.

examples.title: Update PDF Attachment Description
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate file attachment annotations, modify the attached file's description, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Update ZUGFeRD XML Attachment in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to replace an existing ZUGFeRD XML file or add a new one as an embedded attachment in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Validate ZUGFeRD PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF that contains ZUGFeRD data and validate it against the ZUGFeRD specification, writing a validation report to a log file.

examples.title: Verify PDF Digital Signature and Retrieve Signer Details
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a signed PDF, check for compromised signatures, verify the digital signature, and extract signer information such as authority, date, reason, and location using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Bates Numbering Stamp to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to insert a Bates numbering stamp that starts at 1000 and adds a dash suffix on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Bates Numbering to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply year‑based Bates numbering in the format "2026-####" to every page, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Bates Numbering with Alphanumeric Prefix to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, apply Bates numbering that includes an alphanumeric prefix, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Add Bates Numbering with Custom Prefix and Suffix to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply Bates numbering to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with a custom prefix "DOC" and suffix "-2026" for version tracking.

examples.title: Add Blank Front-Matter Page with Custom Label to PDF
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, inserts a blank page at the beginning, and assigns a custom page label "i" (without automatic numbering) to serve as front‑matter numbering.

examples.title: Add Bold Section Header to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to loop through each page of a PDF and insert a centered, bold, uppercase header using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Chapter-Numbered Page Stamps in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add page numbers with a custom "Chapter" prefix to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp.

examples.title: Add Curved Text Watermark to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a repeated text watermark that follows a quadratic Bezier curve across each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Diagonal Repeating Text Watermark to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to overlay a semi‑transparent, diagonal repeating text watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Generation Date Footer to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to insert a text footer with the current date on every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Header Logo Image to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, add a company logo as an image stamp aligned to the left header of each page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Add HTML Header with CSS to First Three PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert an HTML‑styled header, including embedded CSS, on the first three pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Image Footer with Opacity to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add an image footer with 30% opacity to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Image Watermark with Opacity to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp with 20% opacity, center it on each page, apply it as a background watermark, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Add LightGray Background to All PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through each page, set a LightGray background color for branding, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Add Multiple Empty Pages Sequentially
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a series of blank pages to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf by iterating over a list of page counts and respecting the evaluation mode page limit.

examples.title: Add Page Numbers with Arial Font to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert sequential page numbers on each PDF page using a custom Arial font at 14 points with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Page Numbers to Even PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to insert page numbers only on even pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf in C#.

examples.title: Add Page Numbers to Odd PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to insert page numbers only on odd pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp and save the result.

examples.title: Add Page Numbers to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to insert a centered page number stamp starting at 1 on every page of a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

examples.title: Add Page Numbers (Page X of Y) to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create a PageNumberStamp with a custom "Page # of #" format, apply it to every page, and save the result.

examples.title: Add Page Numbers with '/' Separator to PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, and adds a page number stamp formatted as "current/total" at the bottom center, then saves the modified document.

examples.title: Add Page Numbers Using Custom TTF Font
examples.description: Loads a PDF, embeds an external TrueType font, and adds page numbers to each page using a PageNumberStamp configured with the custom font.

examples.title: Add Repeating Image Watermark to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its pages, and tile a semi‑transparent image stamp in a grid pattern to create a repeated watermark on each page.

examples.title: Add Roman Numeral Page Numbers to Introductory PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, apply a PageNumberStamp configured for uppercase Roman numerals to a set of introductory pages, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Add Rotated Image Watermark to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent image watermark, rotated 45°, scaled to half the page size and centered on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Scaled Image Footer to Each PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to insert a footer image on every page of a PDF, scaling it to a fraction of the page width using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Watermark to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent text watermark with an outline to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Superscript Page Numbers to PDF Pages
examples.description: Loads a PDF, creates a PageNumberStamp with a smaller font to simulate superscript, places it at the bottom‑right of each page, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Add Text Header to First PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a text header to the first page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf, configuring the header margin and styling the text.

examples.title: Add Transparent Separator Page to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to append an empty page to a PDF and set its background to transparent using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Year-Based Text Watermark to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create a TextStamp that includes the current year, and apply it as a semi‑transparent background watermark on each page.

examples.title: Add Zero‑Padded Page Numbers to PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, creates a PageNumberStamp with a format that pads single‑digit page numbers with a leading zero, applies the stamp to every page, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Adjust PDF BleedBox for Printer Specifications
examples.description: Shows how to read each page's BleedBox (or fall back to MediaBox), expand it by a fixed amount, and save the modified PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Alternating Page Background Colors in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, assign LightGray to even pages and White to odd pages as background colors, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Append Empty A4 Page to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, add a blank page, resize it to A4 dimensions, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Append a Page from One PDF to Another
examples.description: Shows how to load two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf, copy the first page from the source document, append it to the end of the target document, and save the combined PDF.

examples.title: Apply Theme-Based Background Color to PDF Pages
examples.description: The example reads a theme name from a JSON configuration file, maps it to an Aspose.Pdf.Color, and sets that color as the background for every page in a PDF document.

examples.title: Batch Add Bates Numbering to PDFs with Increment of 5
examples.description: Loads each PDF from an input folder, adds Bates numbering to every page where the counter increases by 5 for each subsequent page, and saves the processed files to an output folder.

examples.title: Convert Odd Pages from Landscape to Portrait
examples.description: Shows how to change the orientation of odd‑numbered PDF pages from landscape to portrait by swapping their MediaBox dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages from Portrait to Landscape
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, swap the MediaBox width and height using SetPageSize, and save the document so all pages become landscape orientation.

examples.description: Loads a PDF, examines each page's MediaBox, and swaps width and height for landscape pages so that all pages become portrait before saving the document.

examples.title: Copy MediaBox from Page 8 to Page 12

examples.title: Insert New Page with Same Size as Page 2

examples.title: Crop PDF Page by Setting MediaBox
examples.description: Shows how to modify a page's MediaBox to define a custom cropping region without altering the page content.

examples.title: Crop PDF Pages to 4:3 Aspect Ratio
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through all pages of a PDF and adjust each page's CropBox so the content fits a fixed 4:3 aspect ratio using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Delete First Page from PDF Document
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, remove the first page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Delete Last Page from PDFs in a Folder
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a directory, remove the last page of each document using Aspose.Pdf, and save the modified files back to disk.

examples.title: Delete Last Three Pages from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, remove the last three pages, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Delete Page Range from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove pages 5 through 10 from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Delete method with an integer array.

examples.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF Using a Text File
examples.description: Loads a PDF, reads a list of page numbers from a text file, validates them, deletes the specified pages, and saves the result.

examples.title: Delete PDF Pages Based on Config File
examples.description: Demonstrates reading a list of page numbers from an external text file and deleting those pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Duplicate Third Page in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to duplicate the third page of a PDF document and insert the copy immediately after the original using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Page Dimensions to CSV
examples.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, reads each page's width and height, and writes the page number and dimensions to a CSV file for external analysis.

examples.title: Extend BleedBox Beyond CropBox in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, read each page's CropBox, create a BleedBox that extends 5 points beyond it on all sides, assign it to the page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Extract Pages, Resize to A4, and Reinsert at New Position
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract a range of pages from a PDF, change each page size to A4, remove the original pages, and insert the modified pages at a different position using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Blank Page After Each PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert a blank page after every existing page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, doubling the total page count.

examples.title: Insert Blank Page at Specific Position in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, insert a blank page at position 3 using the PageCollection.Insert method, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Insert Empty Page with Custom Size at Beginning of PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a blank page with specific dimensions (200 × 300 points) as the first page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Empty Page with Custom Size into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, add a blank page, set its width and height from user input, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Page from Another PDF at Specific Index
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert a page from a source PDF into a target PDF at position 2 while preserving the original page size and rotation using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Ten Empty Pages at PDF Midpoint
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, calculate the midpoint page index, and batch insert ten blank pages before saving the document.

examples.title: Move Even Pages to End of PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to reorder a PDF by extracting even‑numbered pages and appending them to the end while preserving their original order using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Move Page 9 to First Position in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to reposition the ninth page of a PDF to the first position by inserting it at the new index and deleting the original using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Move Pages 3‑6 to End of PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to relocate pages 3 through 6 of a PDF to the document's end using Aspose.Pdf in a single operation.

examples.title: Move PDF Page While Preserving Size and Rotation
examples.description: Demonstrates moving a page from one PDF document to another with Aspose.Pdf while keeping its original dimensions and orientation intact.

examples.title: Read PDF Page Count with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and obtain the total number of pages without saving the document.

examples.title: Read PDF Page Dimensions
examples.description: Loads a PDF document and logs the width and height of each page to the console.

examples.title: Read PDF Page Width and Height
examples.description: Loads a PDF file, iterates through each page, and logs the page's width and height in points using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove Bates Numbering from Selected PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to delete Bates numbering artifacts from specific pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, preserving numbering on other pages.

examples.title: Reorder PDF Pages by Orientation (Landscape First)
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, separate landscape and portrait pages, and create a new PDF with all landscape pages first followed by portrait pages using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Reorder PDF Pages Using a Custom Sequence
examples.description: Shows how to reorder the pages of a PDF by providing a custom integer array that defines the new page order and then saving the reordered document with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Reorder PDF Pages in Descending Order
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, extract its pages, sort them in descending numeric order, and save the reordered document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace Bates Numbering in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to delete any existing Bates numbering artifacts from all pages of a PDF and then add a new Bates numbering sequence using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace PDF Headers and Footers
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove existing headers and footers from each page of a PDF and add new custom header and footer content using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Reset Page Rotation to Original Orientation
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, reset a page's rotation to its original (non‑rotated) state, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize All PDF Pages to A5
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through its PageCollection, resize each page to A5 dimensions, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Resize First PDF Page to Custom Dimensions
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set the first page size to 500 × 700 points, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Resize PDF Page to Letter Size
examples.description: Loads a PDF, verifies it has at least seven pages, and resizes page 7 to Letter dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Fixed Width While Preserving Aspect Ratio
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, and resizes it to a target width of 800 points while maintaining the original aspect ratio, then saves the modified document.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Size
examples.description: Shows how to resize every page of a PDF to the dimensions of a template PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match a Template
examples.description: Shows how to resize every page of a PDF to the dimensions of a reference template PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Printable Area
examples.description: Demonstrates how to resize all pages of a PDF to a specific printable size (595 × 842 points) while scaling the content proportionally using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Uniform Size
examples.description: Shows how to find the largest page dimensions in a PDF and resize all pages to that size using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize Wide PDF Pages to A4
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and resize only pages wider than 600 points to standard A4 size while leaving narrower pages unchanged.

examples.title: Retrieve TrimBox Values After Cropping PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, optionally set a new CropBox, and read the TrimBox of each page to verify the content area.

examples.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, rotate each page by 180° clockwise, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Rotate Every Third PDF Page by 90 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, rotate pages whose number is divisible by three, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate Fourth Page 90 Degrees Clockwise
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rotate the fourth page of a PDF document 90 degrees clockwise using Aspose.Pdf's Rotate property and then save the modified file.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages by Configurable Angles
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotating individual pages using angles defined in a dictionary, and saving the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages Based on Page Number Parity
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through its pages, rotates odd‑numbered pages 90° while leaving even pages unchanged, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages in Reverse Order
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rotate each page of a PDF 90 degrees clockwise while iterating from the last page to the first using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set CropBox to Trim Margins on PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to adjust each page's CropBox in a PDF to remove margins by inseting from the MediaBox using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Page Background Color Using CMYK Values
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a CMYK color, apply it as the background for each page, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using RGB Values
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create a brand color from RGB components, apply it as the background for each page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using HSL Values
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert HSL color values to an Aspose.Pdf.Color and apply the resulting color as the background for every page in a PDF document.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background to Transparent
examples.description: Demonstrates how to make each page of a PDF have a transparent background using Aspose.Pdf, then saves the modified document.

examples.title: Trim White Space Around PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove surrounding white space from each PDF page by detecting blank pages and setting the TrimBox to the content bounding box using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Trim White Space with Per-Page Pixel Tolerance
examples.description: Demonstrates how to trim the white margins of each PDF page using a custom pixel tolerance that is converted to PDF points. The example handles per‑page tolerance values and skips blank pages.

examples.title: Batch Extract Vector Graphics from PDFs to SVG
examples.description: Shows how to scan a folder of PDF files, detect pages that contain vector graphics, and save each page's graphics as an SVG file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Combine PDF Form Data into a Single JSON Array
examples.description: The example loads several PDF files, extracts their form fields as JSON using Aspose.Pdf, and merges the individual JSON objects into one JSON array for batch processing.

examples.title: Combine Vector Graphics from Multiple PDFs into a Single SVG
examples.description: The example loads several PDF files, extracts vector graphics from each page using Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor, and merges the resulting SVG fragments into one multi‑page SVG document.

examples.title: Convert PDF to Markdown Preserving Paragraph Indentation
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and saving it as a formatted Markdown file while keeping the original paragraph indentation.

examples.title: Count AcroForm Fields in PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and retrieves the total number of AcroForm fields using the Form.Count property.

examples.title: Enumerate PDF Form Fields on a Specific Page
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, selects a given page, and logs each form field’s name, type, and value.

examples.title: Export AcroForm Fields to XFDF
examples.description: Demonstrates exporting AcroForm fields (annotations) from a PDF to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf's ExportAnnotationsToXfdf method with a FileStream.

examples.title: Export Filtered PDF Form Fields to JSON
examples.description: The example opens a PDF, selects form fields whose names start with a given prefix, extracts their values, and writes the filtered collection to a JSON file.

examples.title: Export PDF AcroForm Fields to JSON
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all AcroForm field names and values, and writes them to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Using a FileStream
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, creating a FileStream, and exporting all annotations (including form fields) to an XFDF file via Document.ExportAnnotationsToXfdf, with proper resource disposal.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, binding it to the Facade Form class, and exporting the form fields to an FDF file using a FileStream.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF document, bind it to the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form facade, and export the form fields to an FDF file using a FileStream that is automatically closed.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, export all form fields to a JSON string, and output the result to the console.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and export its interactive form fields to a JSON file using the Document.Form.ExportToJson method.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON Stream
examples.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF, creating a FileStream, and exporting all form fields directly to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf's ExportToJson method with optional formatting options.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML Using MemoryStream
examples.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates its form fields, and writes each field's name, type, and value to an XML document stored in a MemoryStream.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Files
examples.description: Iterates through PDF files in a folder, loads each document with Aspose.Pdf, and exports its form fields to a JSON file with the same base name.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XML
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and export its form fields to an XML file using the Document.SaveXml method.

examples.title: Export PDF Page as PNG Image at Specified DPI
examples.description: Shows how to rasterize a PDF page into a PNG file using Aspose.Pdf with a custom resolution (DPI).

examples.title: Export PDF Subpaths as Individual PNG Images
examples.description: Shows how to capture each SubPath on PDF pages using GraphicsAbsorber and render each one to a separate PNG file.

examples.title: Export PDF Subpaths to Separate SVG Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, configure SVG extraction to treat each subpath as an individual graphic, and save each subpath as a separate SVG file with a transparent background.

examples.title: Export PDF Tables to CSV with Visual Cell Borders
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract tables from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber and write them to a CSV file while preserving visual cell borders with delimiter markers.

examples.title: Export PDF to PDF, HTML, and Streams with Proper FileStream Disposal
examples.description: Demonstrates saving an Aspose.Pdf Document as a PDF file, as HTML, and into FileStream objects, including per‑page PDF stream export, while ensuring streams are closed via using blocks.

examples.title: Export PDF to SVG with DPI Scaling and Custom CSS
examples.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to SVG with DPI‑like scaling, extracting vector graphics per page, and injecting custom CSS styling into the generated SVG files using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Checkbox States from PDF AcroForm to JSON
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its AcroForm fields, collects the checked state of each checkbox, and outputs the results as a JSON boolean array.

examples.title: Extract and Combine Vector Graphics from PDF into Multi‑Page SVG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to extract vector graphics from each page of a PDF with SvgExtractor and merge them into a single multi‑page SVG document.

examples.title: Extract Embedded Fonts from PDF and Save as TTF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieving all embedded fonts, and exporting each font to a .ttf file in a specified directory.

examples.title: Extract First Page Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract the text of the first page using a TextAbsorber, and save the result to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

examples.title: Extract Graphics from Specific PDF Pages to SVG
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, select given page numbers, collect graphic elements with GraphicsAbsorber, and save them as SVG files using SvgExtractor.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF Using GraphicsAbsorber and Save as JPEG
examples.description: The example opens a PDF, uses GraphicsAbsorber to locate image graphic elements, renders each page to a bitmap, crops the image regions, and saves them as high‑resolution JPEG files.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's image resources, and save each embedded image as a PNG file in an output folder.

examples.title: Extract Large Graphics from PDF as SVG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to collect graphic elements from each PDF page, filter them by bounding‑box area, and export the qualifying graphics as separate SVG files.

examples.title: Extract Paragraphs from PDF Preserving Line Breaks
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to absorb the logical paragraph structure of each page, iterate through sections and lines, and write the extracted text to a .txt file while keeping original line breaks.

examples.title: Extract PDF Form Field Names and Values
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate its form fields, and return a dictionary mapping each field's full name to its current string value.

examples.title: Extract PDF Form Text with Start/End Logging
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, extract text from form XObjects on each page, and log the start and end timestamps of the extraction run.

examples.title: Extract PDF Metadata and Convert to SVG Vector Graphics
examples.description: Opens a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, reads the author and title from the document info, and saves the document as an SVG to preserve vector graphics.

examples.title: Extract PDF Stamp Annotation Texts to JSON
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all pages and annotations, extracts the text content of each StampAnnotation, and writes the collected strings to a JSON file.

examples.title: Extract Font, Table, and Form Field Statistics from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load PDF files with Aspose.Pdf, count distinct fonts, AcroForm fields, and tables from tagged content, and log the statistics for each document.

examples.title: Extract PDF Tables to Separate CSV Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables in a PDF, convert each table's rows and cells to CSV format, and save each table as an individual CSV file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Vector Graphics and Recolor to Brand Palette
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts each page's vector graphics as SVG, replaces fill and stroke colors with a specified brand color, and saves the transformed SVG files.

examples.title: Extract Selected Radio Button Values from PDF Form
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates its form fields, identifies radio button groups and retrieves the label of the selected option for each group.

examples.title: Extract Single Graphic Element as SVG from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, use Aspose.Pdf.Vector.SvgExtractor to get vector graphic elements from a page, pick one by index, and save it as an SVG file.

examples.title: Extract Superscript and Subscript from PDF with Annotations
examples.description: Demonstrates how to detect superscript and subscript characters in a PDF by analyzing font size and baseline offsets, and annotates them in a plain‑text output file.

examples.title: Extract Superscript and Subscript Text from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, use a TextFragmentAbsorber with pure formatting extraction, and identify fragments that are superscript or subscript, outputting them with Unicode markers.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF to TXT using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all page text using TextAbsorber, and write the concatenated result to a .txt file.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from Encrypted PDF to SVG
examples.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF by providing a password, decrypting it, and saving its vector graphics as a single SVG file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF to Individual SVG Files
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and extract each vector graphic as a separate SVG file using SvgExtractor.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF Page to SVG Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, select a specific page, and extract each vector graphic on that page as separate SVG files using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF to SVG Preserving Coordinates
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save any vector graphics on each page as SVG files while preserving the original PDF coordinate system.

examples.title: Iterate and Fill PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through all form fields using a foreach loop, sets values based on field type, and saves the updated document.

examples.title: Iterate PDF Pages to List Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through each page, retrieve the form fields in tab order, and output each field's name and concrete type.

examples.title: Load PDF and Enumerate AcroForm Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, accessing its AcroForm, and iterating over form fields to read basic information such as field name, type, and text box value.

examples.title: Log Form Field Count per PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through its pages, and logging the total number of form fields for each page iteration.

examples.title: Modify Checkbox Appearance and Read Its Value
examples.description: Shows how to change a checkbox's visual style, color, border, and export value using Aspose.PDF, then retrieve its checked state and save the updated PDF.

examples.title: Parallel PDF Text Extraction Using TPL
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from multiple PDF files concurrently with the Task Parallel Library, storing results in a thread‑safe collection.

examples.title: Parse Number Field Value to Decimal
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read a numeric form field from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, convert its value to a decimal with invariant culture, and perform calculations on the parsed number.

examples.title: Generate PDF Summary Report with Image, Graphic, and Text Statistics
examples.description: The example loads each PDF in a folder, extracts total text length, counts images and vector graphics per page, and writes a CSV summary report.

examples.title: Read AcroForm Fields from PDF Stream
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF as a read‑only stream and enumerate its AcroForm fields using Aspose.Pdf without saving the file to disk.

examples.title: Read Checkbox Value and Convert to Boolean
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, accessing its form fields, reading the Value property of a checkbox, and converting that string to a Boolean indicating whether the box is checked.

examples.title: Retrieve All AcroForm Fields from a PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, accesses its AcroForm, and enumerates all form fields, printing each field's full name and current value.

examples.title: Retrieve PDF Form Field by Name
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm, and retrieve a specific form field using the Form indexer.

examples.title: Retrieve Runtime Types of PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, accesses its form collection, and prints each field's name along with its runtime type using the GetType() method.

examples.title: Save JSON Data to UTF-8 File
examples.description: Shows how to write a JSON string to a file on disk using UTF‑8 encoding with File.WriteAllText.

examples.title: Serialize PDF Form Data to JSON Bytes
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts its form fields as JSON into a memory stream, and returns the JSON content as a byte array for API consumption.

examples.title: Validate PDF Fonts Against System Installed Fonts
examples.description: The example opens a PDF, iterates through all referenced fonts on each page, and reports any fonts that are not installed on the host system.

examples.title: Add Invisible Digital Signature with Timestamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply an invisible PKCS#7 digital signature to an existing PDF, recording the signing time and using incremental updates to keep the original layout unchanged.

examples.title: Add Visible Digital Signature to Second Page of PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a visible PKCS#7 digital signature in the bottom‑right corner of the second page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Decrypt Password-Protected PDFs Using a Lookup Table
examples.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt multiple password‑protected PDF files in a folder by reading passwords from a CSV lookup table and saving the decrypted versions.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt and Sign PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files with AES‑256 and then apply a PKCS#7 digital signature to each encrypted document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Passwords Derived from File Names
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt every PDF in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, creating user and owner passwords from each file name and saving the encrypted files to a separate output directory.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Date-Based Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, generating a unique password for each file from its name and the current date.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs and Archive to ZIP
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files with unique passwords using Aspose.Pdf and store the encrypted documents in a ZIP archive.

examples.title: Batch Sign and Compress PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF files, add a PKCS#7 digital signature field to each document, optimize resources to compress the file, and save the signed PDFs.

examples.title: Batch Sign PDFs Using Author Metadata to Select Certificates
examples.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDFs, read each document's Author metadata, choose a matching certificate, add a signature field, and apply a PKCS#7 signature using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Unique Visible Signature Images
examples.description: Demonstrates how to process multiple PDF files, add a distinct visible signature image to each, and apply a digital PKCS#7 signature using a common certificate.

examples.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Document-Type Specific Certificates
examples.description: Demonstrates how to sign multiple PDF files in a folder, selecting a certificate based on each document's type metadata and applying the signature to all signature fields.

examples.title: Certify PDF with Append-Only Signature to Allow Annotations
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a certification signature to a PDF that permits further annotations by enabling incremental updates.

examples.title: Certify PDF with Form Filling Permission
examples.description: Shows how to apply a DocMDP certification signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, allowing form filling while blocking other content modifications.

examples.title: Certify PDF to Prevent Further Modifications
examples.description: Shows how to add a certification signature to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and set SignaturesAppendOnly so any later changes invalidate the signature.

examples.title: Compute and Verify PDF Hash Before and After Signing
examples.description: Shows how to calculate a SHA‑256 hash of a PDF before signing, sign the document, recompute the hash after signing, compare the hashes for integrity, and optionally run the SignaturesCompromiseDetector.

examples.title: Apply Custom Security Handler to Disable Copy‑Paste with Warning Overlay
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a visible warning annotation to each PDF page and protect the document with a custom security handler that disables copy‑paste functionality.

examples.title: Custom Security Handler Logging PDF Access
examples.description: Demonstrates how to implement a custom ICustomSecurityHandler that logs encryption/decryption operations and password checks, then encrypts and opens a PDF using the handler.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF, Extract Images, and Re‑encrypt with New Owner Password
examples.description: The example loads an encrypted PDF using a user password, extracts all embedded images to a folder, and then re‑encrypts the document with a new owner password and specific permissions.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF and Extract Embedded Images
examples.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF with a user password, decrypting it, and extracting all embedded images to separate files.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF and Re‑sign Each Signature Field with Different Certificates
examples.description: The example opens an encrypted PDF, removes its password protection, locates all signature fields, and applies a new PKCS#7 signature to each field using a distinct certificate.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password and Update Metadata
examples.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF using the owner password, decrypting it, modifying document metadata (title, author, subject, keywords), and saving the updated file.

examples.title: Decrypt Password-Protected PDF Using Owner Password
examples.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF with the owner password, decrypting it, and saving the unprotected version using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF Using Certificate from Hardware Token
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF encrypted with a certificate, retrieve the private key from a hardware token (or store), decrypt the document, and save the unencrypted version using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Digitally Sign PDF and Lock It for Read‑Only Access
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, adds a digital signature field, signs it with a PKCS#7 certificate, then encrypts the document with no permissions to enforce a read‑only state, and finally saves the locked PDF.

examples.title: Download, Sign, and Upload PDF to Azure Blob Storage
examples.description: The sample downloads a PDF (with a local fallback), adds a digital signature using a PFX certificate, and uploads the signed document to Azure Blob Storage.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Set User/Owner Passwords
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, apply AES‑256 encryption, set both user and owner passwords, define allowed permissions, and save the encrypted document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF and Allow Copying While Blocking Printing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256, permit content extraction (copy) and disable printing by setting appropriate permissions with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Custom Security Handler to Disable Copy‑Paste
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a custom security handler when encrypting a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, setting permissions that allow printing but block content extraction (copy‑paste).

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password and Disable Printing
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256 with user and owner passwords while restricting permissions to prevent printing.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password and High‑Resolution Printing
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using an owner password, enable high‑resolution printing, and block copying by setting permissions with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Print‑Only Permission
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set user and owner passwords, and restrict permissions so that only printing is allowed.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 128‑bit and Restrict Editing
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying 128‑bit RC4 encryption with user and owner passwords, restricting permissions to printing only, and saving the encrypted document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF and Restrict Content Extraction
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying AES‑256 encryption, and setting permissions to allow only printing while disabling content extraction, then saving the protected file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with view‑only access and edit password
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so it can be opened without a password for viewing, while requiring an owner password for editing and applying specific permissions.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Certificate from Smart Card/HSM
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using a public certificate stored in a smart‑card or HSM, applying AES‑256 encryption and specific permissions.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Permissions
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, requiring a user password to open, setting allowed permissions, and saving the protected document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Printing and Copying Permissions
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set user and owner passwords, and enable printing and content extraction permissions.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords and Remove User Password
examples.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with both user and owner passwords and specific permissions, then reopening it with the owner password to clear the user password while keeping the file encrypted.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, applies AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, and returns the encrypted PDF as a byte array.

examples.title: Create Encrypted PDF with Attachment and Digital Signature
examples.description: The example shows how to embed a file into a PDF, encrypt the document with a certificate using AES‑256, add a signature field, and apply a digital signature using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Enumerate PDF Signature Fields and Show Basic Info
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates over its form fields to locate signature fields, and prints basic signature details such as authority, location, and reason using the core Aspose.Pdf API.

examples.title: Extract Certificate Chain from PDF Signature
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, iterates over its signature fields, extracts the leaf certificate, builds the X509 chain, and saves each certificate in DER format.

examples.title: Extract Digest Algorithm from PDF Digital Signatures

examples.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Signature Appearance

examples.title: Sign PDF and Embed Custom XMP Metadata
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a PKCS#7 certificate and embed custom XMP metadata describing the signing details.
