examples.title: Import Encrypted XFA Form Data into PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates decrypting an AES‑encrypted XML file containing XFA form data and assigning it to an interactive PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Import Form Field Appearances from JSON into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, import form field appearance settings from a JSON file, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Import Form Data from Compressed JSON into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, decompress a GZIP‑compressed JSON payload, import the form data using Form.ImportFromJson, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Import Form Data from JSON via REST API
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF form, retrieve JSON data from a REST API, populate the form fields using Document.Form.ImportFromJson, and save the populated PDF.

examples.title: Import Form Data from JSON into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF document, bulk‑import form field values from a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf, and save the updated PDF.

examples.title: Import Form Fields from CSV into PDF
examples.description: Reads a CSV file containing field metadata and creates corresponding form fields on a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, setting properties like required and read‑only.

examples.title: Import JSON Form Data into PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, import form field values from a JSON string using Aspose.Pdf, and save the populated document.

examples.title: Import Tax Rate from XML into Hidden PDF Form Field
examples.description: Shows how to read a tax rate from an XML file and populate (or create) a hidden text box form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Import XFA Form Data from XML into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load XFA data from an XML file and assign it to a PDF that contains an XFA form using Aspose.Pdf, then save the filled PDF.

examples.title: Import XFA Form Data from XML with Error Handling
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF containing an XFA form, import XML data into the form, and gracefully handle missing or malformed XML files.

examples.title: Import XFDF Form Data from a Network Stream into a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to download XFDF (XML) form data via HTTP and import the field values into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's XfdfReader.

examples.title: Import XFDF Interaction Log into PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, import annotations from an XFDF (XML) interaction log using Aspose.Pdf, and save the reconstructed document.

examples.title: Import XFDF Signature Data and Sign PDF Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how to import digital signature information from an XFDF (XML) file into a PDF, locate the corresponding signature field, apply a PKCS#7 signature using a PFX certificate, and save the signed document.

examples.title: Import XML Data into PDF Form (XFA)
examples.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, read transformed XML, assign it to the XFA form fields, and save the populated PDF.

examples.title: Import XML Data into PDF XFA Form
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file and import its data into an XFA form inside a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then save the updated PDF.

examples.title: Import XML Form Data into Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to bind XML form data to several PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf and save the updated files.

examples.title: Import XML Form Data into PDF Using AssignXfa
examples.description: Shows how to load an XFA PDF, parse XML form data from a string, and import it into the PDF using Aspose.Pdf's AssignXfa method.

examples.title: Insert Current Date into PDF Form Field
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a DateField on a PDF page, setting its display format, assigning the current system date, and saving the updated document.

examples.title: Insert Form Field at Specific Index in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a TextBoxField and inserting it into the Document.Form collection at a given zero‑based index, with a fallback to adding at the end if the index is out of range.

examples.title: Language‑Specific PDF Form with Dynamic Label
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF form that changes a label's text based on the selected locale using a combo box and JavaScript actions.

examples.title: List PDF Form Field Names
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, checks for an AcroForm, and enumerates all form fields, printing each field's name.

examples.title: Create Locale-Aware PDF with JavaScript Translations
examples.description: Demonstrates embedding a JavaScript dictionary of translations in a PDF and updating a text box field based on the selected locale using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Lock PDF Form Fields (Read‑Only)
examples.description: Shows how to set every form field in a PDF to read‑only and optionally flatten the form using Aspose.Pdf, then save the locked document.

examples.title: Log PDF Form Field Modifications
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF form fields, record their original values, apply changes (e.g., update text boxes and set read‑only), and write each modification to a timestamped log file for audit purposes.

examples.title: Mark PDF Form Field as Required
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a specific form field, set its Required property to enforce validation, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Merge PDFs While Preserving Unique AcroForm Field Names
examples.description: Demonstrates how to combine two PDF documents that contain AcroForm fields, renaming duplicate field names to keep them unique before appending pages and saving the merged result.

examples.title: Parallel Batch Fill PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf to fill the same set of form fields in multiple PDF documents concurrently with Parallel.ForEach, improving batch processing performance.

examples.title: Generate PDF Form Field Report with Character Limits
examples.description: Loads one or more PDF files, iterates through their form fields, and prints each field's name, type, and character limit for text‑based fields.

examples.title: Create PDF Form with Language‑Dependent Labels
examples.description: Demonstrates building a PDF form that includes a language selection combo box and uses JavaScript to change label field texts dynamically based on the selected language.

examples.title: Populate PDF Combo Box from Database Data
examples.description: Shows how to create a combo box form field in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, fill its options from a data source (simulated DataTable), optionally select a default item, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from a Dictionary
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, iterating over its form fields, and assigning values from a case‑insensitive dictionary before saving the updated document.

examples.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from XML via XSLT
examples.description: Demonstrates how to transform XML data with an XSLT stylesheet into XFDF and import the resulting field values into a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Read PDF Form Field Value
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, finds a form field by its name, extracts the field's value, and prints it to the console.

examples.title: Read XMP PDF/A Extension Field with Default Fallback
examples.description: Shows how to extract a PDF/A extension field from an XML metadata file and return a predefined default value when the field is absent.

examples.title: Remove a Form Field from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a form field by its name, and delete it using the Aspose.Pdf Form API.

examples.title: Remove JavaScript Actions from PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to flatten a PDF with Aspose.Pdf to strip all form fields and any attached JavaScript, enhancing document security before distribution.

examples.title: Remove Signature Form Fields from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to loop through a PDF's form collection, identify fields of type SignatureField, and delete them using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove Typewriter Form Fields on Page 3 Using TextFragmentAbsorber
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate and delete Typewriter (TextBoxField) form fields on a specific PDF page (page 3) by using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber and form manipulation APIs.

examples.title: Rename PDF Form Field Programmatically
examples.description: Loads a PDF, checks for a specific form field, renames it (including its MappingName), and saves the updated document.

examples.title: Replace XFA Form with AcroForm Using XML Template
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert an XFA‑based PDF to a standard AcroForm by loading field definitions from an XML template and programmatically adding the corresponding form fields.

examples.title: Require Signature Field and Lock PDF After Signing
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a required digital signature field to a PDF, signing it with a PKCS#7 certificate, and locking the document to prevent further modifications.

examples.title: Restore Editable Form Fields from Original PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to regain editability of form fields by loading the original (unflattened) PDF, modifying a field, and saving the result.

examples.title: Rotate Form Field Label by 45 Degrees
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a PDF form field label by applying a 45‑degree rotation to the field's rectangle before creating the TextBoxField using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Save PDF with Incremental Update after Form Fill
examples.description: The example opens an existing PDF, fills a text box form field, and saves the document using Aspose.Pdf's parameterless Save method, which writes the changes as an incremental update preserving previous revisions.

examples.title: Select ListBox Option in PDF Form
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, finds a ListBox form field by name, sets its selected option using a 1‑based index, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Select Radio Button in PDF Form
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, locating a radio button form field, setting its selected option, and saving the updated document.

examples.title: Set Up Automatic Calculation for PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, enable auto‑recalculation of form fields, assign a JavaScript calculation script to a field, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Set Beveled Border Style for PDF Form Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve a form field widget annotation in a PDF and apply a beveled border style with a specified width and color using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Checkbox Default State to Checked in PDF
examples.description: Creates a PDF document, adds a checkbox form field, sets its default state to checked, and saves the file.

examples.title: Set Dashed Border on PDF Form Field
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a specific form field, and apply a dashed border style using Aspose.Pdf before saving the document.

examples.title: Set Date Field Default to Current Time in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a DateField to a PDF, format it as HH:mm:ss, and set its default value to the current system time when the document is loaded.

examples.title: Set Default Appearance for PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates how to define a default font, size, and color for all form fields in a PDF by assigning a DefaultAppearance to the document's Form.

examples.title: Set Default Selected Item in PDF Form Dropdown
examples.description: Loads a PDF, finds the 'Country' form field, and sets its default selected value to 'United States' for ComboBox or ListBox fields using Aspose.Pdf Forms API.

examples.title: Set Default Selected Radio Button Value in PDF Form
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a radio button field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf and programmatically set its default selected option to "Credit".

examples.title: Set EmployeeID Form Field to Read‑Only in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a form field named "EmployeeID", and make it read‑only so users cannot modify its value, then save the updated document.

examples.title: Set Maximum Characters for PDF Form Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how to limit the number of characters a user can enter in a PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf's FormEditor. The example loads a PDF, applies a 50‑character limit to the "CustomerName" field, and saves the result.

examples.title: Set File‑Select Field Size Limit to 2 MB
examples.description: Shows how to enforce a 2 MB maximum upload size for a file‑select field in a PDF form by using Aspose.Pdf's FileSizeLimitToMemoryLoading property and adding a TextBoxField to the document.

examples.title: Set Font Size and Style for a PDF Text Box Field
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, adds a TextBox form field, and configures its font name, size, and color via DefaultAppearance, also applying minimum and maximum font size limits.

examples.title: Set Form Field Visibility Based on Another Field
examples.description: Shows how to attach JavaScript to a PDF form field with Aspose.Pdf so that the visibility of a target field is toggled depending on the source field's value.

examples.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Password Fields
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate over its form fields, and enforce a 20‑character limit on password fields using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Maximum Length for PDF Text Box Field
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a text box form field, set its MaxLen property to restrict user input, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Set NoExport Flag for Sensitive PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF form fields with Aspose.Pdf and mark fields containing sensitive data as non‑exportable (NoExport) so they are omitted from exported data.

examples.title: Set PDF Checkbox Field Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, finds the first checkbox form field, sets its checked state based on input data, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Set Password Field Value and Make Read‑Only in PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, locates a password box form field, assigns a password value, marks the field read‑only, and saves the updated document.

examples.title: Set PDF Form Field to Read‑Only
examples.description: Loads a PDF, retrieves a text box form field, assigns an initial value, marks the field as read‑only to prevent further editing, and saves the updated document.

examples.title: Set TextBox Value in PDF Form with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, checks for an AcroForm, updates the "Name" text box field, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Set PDF Document Metadata After Form Processing
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, optionally fill form fields, set standard and tagged metadata such as author, title, and language, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Zoom Using FitWindow
examples.description: Opens an existing PDF, enables the FitWindow viewer preference to make the document automatically zoom to fit the window, and saves the updated file.

examples.title: Set Radio Button Export Values in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a radio button form field with custom export codes for each option using Aspose.Pdf, set a default selection, and save the updated PDF.

examples.title: Mark PDF Form Field as Required and Validate
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, locating a form field, marking it as required (which shows a red border when empty), clearing its value, saving the document, and running PDF/A‑1B validation.

examples.title: Set Text Box Background Color to Light Gray
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a TextBoxField in its form, change the field's background fill color to light gray, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Tooltip for Email Form Field in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate the 'Email' form field, assign a tooltip (alternate name) that describes the required input format, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Sign and Lock a PDF Signature Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how to sign the 'ClientSignature' field in a PDF using a PKCS#7 certificate and then lock the field to prevent further edits during review.

examples.title: Style PDF Form Field Border Color and Width
examples.description: Shows how to change the border width and color of a specific form field in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Synchronize PDF Form Data via XFDF Export/Import
examples.description: Exports filled form fields from a source PDF to an XFDF (XML) file and imports them into a target PDF, resulting in a synchronized, filled document.

examples.title: Transfer and Transform PDF Form Data Using JSON
examples.description: Shows how to export form fields from a PDF to JSON, modify the data (rename fields and change values), and import the transformed data into another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Unit Test SubmitFormAction Returns 200 OK
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a submit button using Aspose.Pdf and verify the form submission by mocking an HTTP POST request that returns a 200 OK status.

examples.title: Update PDF Form Fields from XML Subset
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file containing a subset of field values and update the matching form fields in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Update PDF Form Fields with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF, setting text and checkbox values in its form fields, and saving the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Validate Age NumberField Rejects Alphabetic Input
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a NumberField for an Age entry, allow only numeric characters, and verify that alphabetic input is rejected with an InvalidValueFormatException.

examples.title: Validate Date Field Format in PDF with JavaScript
examples.description: Shows how to add a DateField to a PDF document and attach a JavaScript action that validates the entered value against the MM/DD/YYYY regular expression.

examples.title: Add Email Validation to PDF Form
examples.description: Demonstrates how to attach a JavaScript validation action to a PDF form's email textbox, ensuring the value contains an "@" before it can be saved.

examples.title: Validate File Size for PDF FileSelectBoxField
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF form, read a FileSelectBoxField, check the selected file's size against a 5 MB limit, and add a warning annotation if the limit is exceeded.

examples.title: Validate IPv4 Address in PDF Form Field
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, retrieve a text box form field, validate its value with an IPv4 regular expression, highlight invalid entries, and save the document.

examples.title: Validate Password Protection on PDF Form Field
examples.description: The example creates an encrypted PDF containing a text box form field, then shows that opening the document with an incorrect password throws an InvalidPasswordException, while the correct password allows reading the field value.

examples.title: Validate Required Form Fields Before Saving PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, checks that all fields marked as required have values, and only saves the document if validation passes.

examples.title: Validate Required PDF Form Fields and Export to JSON
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, checks that all fields marked as required contain a value, and exports the form data to a JSON file only if validation passes.

examples.title: Validate MaxLen Truncation for PDF TextBoxField
examples.description: Demonstrates setting a maximum character length on a PDF form TextBoxField with Aspose.Pdf and verifies that input exceeding the limit is automatically truncated.

examples.title: Validate XML Against XSD and Import into PDF Form (XFA)
examples.description: The example validates an incoming XML file against an XSD schema and, if valid, imports the XML data into an XFA PDF form using Aspose.Pdf, then saves the filled PDF.

examples.title: Verify PDF Form Field Count and Update a Field
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Document.Form.Count to ensure a PDF contains the expected number of form fields, then updates a specific field and saves the document.

examples.title: Add Background Image to PDF Page and Draw Shapes on Top
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set a background image for a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf and overlay a graph with rectangle, ellipse, and line shapes on top of the image.

examples.title: Add Centered Graph to PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to create a Graph, set its horizontal and vertical alignment to center, configure its appearance with GraphInfo, add it to a page's Paragraphs collection, and save the PDF.

examples.title: Add Dashed Rectangle to PDF Graph
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a Graph container, define a rectangle with a 2‑point dashed border, and save the document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Ellipse with Border and Centered Text to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to draw an ellipse with a thick border and semi‑transparent fill and place a centered TextFragment inside it using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Filled Bezier Curve with Opacity to PDF Graph
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a Graph, draw a Bezier curve, set a semi‑transparent fill color and border thickness, and save the document.

examples.title: Add Filled Circle to PDF with Aspose.Pdf Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF document, adding a Graph that spans the page, and drawing a filled circle with a specified center and radius, including platform‑specific handling for GDI+.

examples.title: Add Filled Rectangle with Dashed Border to PDF Graph
examples.description: Shows how to create a Graph on a PDF page and draw a rectangle with a light‑gray fill, black dashed border, and custom line width using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Gradient Ellipse Graph to PDF Pages Concurrently
examples.description: The example loads multiple PDF files in parallel, creates a full‑page graph on each page, and fills it with a series of ellipses whose colors gradually change to simulate a gradient. The modified PDFs are saved to an output folder.

examples.title: Add Graph to PDF Document
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, creating a Graph container with rectangle and line shapes, positioning it on the first page, and saving the modified file.

examples.title: Add Graph Watermark to PDF Pages
examples.description: The example iterates through PDF files in a folder, adds a Graph containing a rectangle shape as a watermark to every page, and saves the modified documents to an output folder.

examples.title: Add Multiple Colored Line Segments to a PDF Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph in Aspose.Pdf, adding several Line shapes with different colors, and saving the PDF while handling non‑Windows GDI+ requirements.

examples.title: Add Non-Overlapping Random Rectangles to a PDF Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates placing multiple random-sized rectangles on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf while ensuring they do not overlap by performing bounds intersection checks before adding them to a Graph.

examples.title: Add a New Page and Draw Shapes Using Graph
examples.description: The example loads an existing PDF, adds a blank page, creates a Graph container, draws a rectangle, ellipse, and line, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Add Rectangle with Shadow to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to draw a rectangle with a drop‑shadow in a PDF by using a Graph container and a semi‑transparent offset duplicate shape.

examples.title: Add a Red Filled Rectangle to a PDF with Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a Graph canvas, draw a rectangle using absolute coordinates, and apply a solid red fill.

examples.title: Add Regular Hexagon to PDF Graph
examples.description: Shows how to create a Graph, calculate the vertices of a regular hexagon, draw its sides with custom border color and thickness, and embed the shape in a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Rounded Rectangle with Fill to PDF
examples.description: The example creates a PDF document, adds a Graph container, defines a rectangle with rounded corners, applies a solid fill and border, and saves the file while handling platform‑specific GDI+ requirements.

examples.title: Add Rounded Rectangle with Fill to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a Graph, draw a rectangle with rounded corners, apply a solid fill color, and save the document.

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent Rectangle Using Graph Layer
examples.description: Demonstrates how to begin a transparency layer with Aspose.Pdf's Graph container, draw a semi‑transparent rectangle, and end the layer by adding the graph to a PDF page.

examples.title: Add Shapes to PDF Using Dictionary for Fill Colors
examples.description: Shows how to map shape identifiers to fill colors with a dictionary and apply those colors when drawing rectangles, ellipses, and lines in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Shapes with Bounds Checking and Logging to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding rectangle shapes inside a Graph container, performing pre‑validation and catching Aspose.Pdf.BoundsOutOfRangeException, and logging the coordinates of out‑of‑bounds shapes. Includes platform‑specific handling for saving the document.

examples.title: Add Text Inside a Graph with Font Settings in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF, add a Graph container with a background rectangle, and place a styled TextFragment at specific coordinates inside the graph.

examples.title: Add Unfilled Arc with Custom Line Width and Dash Style to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating an unfilled arc in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, setting its line width and dash pattern, and placing it inside a Graph container on a page.

examples.title: Adjust Ellipse Position Within PDF Page Bounds
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ellipse shape, checking if it fits within the page, and repositioning it to stay fully inside the page before saving the document.

examples.title: Align Graph to Left Margin in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a Graph object, positioning it with a left offset, adding a simple shape, and saving the updated document.

examples.title: Apply Clipping Region to PDF Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates defining a rectangular clipping path on a PDF page and rendering a graph so that only the portions inside the rectangle are visible, with platform‑specific handling for GDI+.

examples.title: Apply Clipping Region to PDF Shapes
examples.description: Shows how to use the Clip and EOClip operators to restrict drawing of shapes within a defined rectangular area on a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Insert Logo Rectangle into PDFs
examples.description: Loads each PDF from a source folder, adds a Graph containing a rectangle that represents a company logo, and saves the modified documents to an output folder.

examples.title: Create Bezier Curve in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to draw a cubic Bezier curve using four control points on a PDF page and set its stroke color using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Custom Star Shape in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to compute star vertices, build a closed Path with Line segments, apply fill and stroke colors, and embed the shape in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf Graph objects.

examples.title: Create a Dimension Line in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to draw a dimension‑specific horizontal line inside a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Graph object, including platform‑specific handling for GDI+.

examples.title: Create Ellipse in PDF using Aspose.Pdf Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to draw an ellipse on a PDF page with Aspose.Pdf by defining horizontal and vertical radii, setting the stroke color, and handling platform‑specific saving.

examples.title: Create a Full-Page Graph in a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, obtaining the page width and height, creating a Graph object that matches those dimensions, optionally adding a rectangle shape, and inserting the graph into the page before saving.

examples.title: Create Graph with Rectangle and Ellipse Shapes in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to build a Graph, add a rectangle and an ellipse with distinct fill and stroke settings, and embed the graph into a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create a New PDF with a Default Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document, add a single default‑size page, and save it using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create PDF Collage with Multiple Graphs
examples.description: Shows how to add several Graph objects (rectangle, ellipse, line) at different coordinates on a single PDF page to build a collage.

examples.title: Create PDF with Filled and Outline Rectangles Using Aspose.Pdf Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a graph with both filled shapes and stroke‑only outlines by using Aspose.Pdf's Graph, Rectangle, and GraphInfo objects.

examples.title: Create PDF Graph with Shape Border Colors from Lookup Table
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a graph with rectangle, ellipse, and line shapes whose border colors are assigned using a dictionary lookup. Includes platform‑specific handling for GDI+ dependencies.

examples.title: Create PDF Shapes with Configurable Fill Colors
examples.description: Demonstrates building a PDF document with a Graph container, adding Rectangle, Ellipse, and Line shapes whose fill colors are defined in an external JSON configuration file.

examples.title: Create PDF with Filled Arc Graph
examples.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document, add a Graph containing a filled arc with custom colors, and conditionally handle GDI+ availability on Windows.

examples.title: Create PDF with Graph Using MemoryStream
examples.description: Generates a PDF in memory, adds a simple graph (a rectangle) to a page, and returns the PDF as a byte array, with platform‑specific handling for GDI+ dependencies.

examples.title: Create PDF with Graph and Serialize to Byte Array
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a simple graph using Aspose.Pdf, handle platform‑specific GDI+ requirements, and serialize the document to a byte array for transmission.

examples.title: Create and Rotate an Ellipse in a PDF Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add an ellipse to a Graph container, rotate it 45° using a transformation matrix, and save the result as a PDF.

examples.title: Create Sample Graph with Shapes for PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to build a reusable Aspose.Pdf Graph containing a rectangle, ellipse, and line, then add it to a PDF page.

examples.title: Create Custom Dashed Border with Graph in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set line width and dash pattern via GraphInfo and draw a rectangle as a custom border inside a Graph object, then save the PDF with platform‑specific handling.

examples.title: Deserialize PDF from Byte Array and Add Graph with Labels
examples.description: The example loads a PDF from a byte array, creates a Graph with rectangle and line shapes, adds text labels, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Draw Dimension-Specific Rectangle in a PDF Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF document, adding a Graph, drawing a rectangle with explicit dimensions and styling, inserting a text label, and handling GDI+ availability on different platforms.

examples.title: Draw Straight Line with Custom Cap in PDF
examples.description: Creates a PDF document, adds a page, and draws a red straight line between two points with a specified line cap style.

examples.title: Enable BoundsCheckMode to Validate Graph Shape Placement
examples.description: Demonstrates how to activate BoundsCheckMode.ThrowExceptionIfDoesNotFit on an Aspose.Pdf Graph to ensure that added shapes fit within the defined graph area, with optional overflow handling.

examples.title: Export Graph to PDF Document
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, adding a page, rendering a Graph object with a title, handling GDI+ availability, and saving the document.

examples.title: Export PDF to MemoryStream and Save to File
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, saving it into a MemoryStream, and then writing the stream contents to a physical file on disk.

examples.title: Handle Bounds Checking Errors When Adding Shapes to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates enabling bounds checking for a Graph, adding a rectangle that exceeds the page size, catching the BoundsOutOfRangeException, and logging detailed shape coordinates before saving the PDF.

examples.title: Horizontal Bar Chart Using Aspose.Pdf Graph
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a simple horizontal bar chart by adding multiple rectangle shapes to a Graph with incremental X coordinates.

examples.title: Insert Centered TextFragment into a Graph Rectangle
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a Graph containing a rectangle shape, and adds a centered "Hello World" TextFragment inside that rectangle.

examples.title: Insert Dashed Polyline Annotation into PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a polyline annotation with multiple vertices to a PDF page and apply a dashed line style using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file into an Aspose.Pdf Document, convert it to PDF version 1.7, and save the resulting PDF.

examples.title: Generate PDF from XML using XSLT Configured via JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XSLT path from a JSON configuration file, applying the transformation to an XML document with Aspose.Pdf, and saving the result as a PDF.

examples.title: Generate PDF from XML using XSL‑FO with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file, applying an XSL‑FO template, and saving the transformed result as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Generate PDF Tables from XML Data using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates loading XML into a DataSet, converting each DataTable into an Aspose.Pdf Table, and saving the result as a PDF report.

examples.title: Generate PDF with Retry Logic for Transient I/O Errors
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a text fragment, and saving it while handling transient I/O failures with configurable retry and exponential back‑off.

examples.title: Insert Conditional Page Breaks in PDF Based on XML Content Length
examples.description: Shows how to load XML, treat each element as a text block, and insert blank PDF pages when the accumulated character count exceeds a defined threshold.

examples.title: Insert Dynamic Headers into PDF from XML per Page
examples.description: Demonstrates loading per‑page header text from an XML file, creating a lookup, and assigning a custom HeaderFooter to each PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Insert Footnotes into PDF from XML
examples.description: Demonstrates loading footnote definitions from an XML file and adding them as footnote annotations to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagging and text APIs.

examples.title: Merge PDFs Created from XML Files
examples.description: Demonstrates converting multiple XML documents to PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then merging the resulting PDFs into a single document.

examples.title: Paginate Large XML to Multiple PDFs with Sequential Bates Numbering
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file as a PDF, splitting it into chunks of a fixed page count, and applying continuous Bates numbering across the generated PDF parts.

examples.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from XML Records
examples.description: Shows how to read multiple <Record> elements from an XML file, assign each as XFA data to a PDF form, and save a separate filled PDF for every record.

examples.title: Preserve CDATA Sections When Converting XML to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with XmlLoadOptions to retain CDATA sections and directly saving it as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Register PDF Generation Service with Dependency Injection
examples.description: Demonstrates how to register a PdfOutputGenerator as a singleton in the IServiceCollection and expose it via an IFileOutputGenerator interface for reuse throughout an application.

examples.title: Render HTML CDATA Fragments to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file, extract HTML fragments stored in CDATA sections, and render each fragment into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's HtmlFragment.

examples.title: Repeat Table Header on Each PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a table whose header row repeats on every page when the table spans multiple pages using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Custom Page Margins from XML per Section
examples.description: Shows how to read margin values from an XML file and apply them to specific page ranges in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Image Resolution for Exported PDF Images
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XSL‑FO XML document into an Aspose.Pdf Document, configuring HTML export options to specify image DPI, and saving the PDF as HTML with embedded resources.

examples.title: Set Page Durations for PDF Presentation from XML
examples.description: Demonstrates binding an XML file to an Aspose.Pdf Document, assigning a display duration to each page for presentation mode, and saving the PDF.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Transition Duration from XML
examples.description: Shows how to read page display durations from an XML file and assign them to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Orientation from XML
examples.description: Shows how to read an XML layout file to decide whether pages should be landscape and then apply that orientation to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Size from XML
examples.description: Shows how to read page width and height from an XML file and apply those dimensions to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Size via XML Processing Instruction
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read a custom XML processing instruction to specify page dimensions and apply those dimensions to all pages of an Aspose.Pdf document.

examples.title: Set PDF Permissions to Restrict Printing and Copying
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file into a PDF, apply custom security permissions that block printing and content extraction, and save the encrypted PDF.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences When Converting XML to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with Aspose.Pdf, converting it to PDF, and configuring viewer preferences such as FitWindow and PageMode before saving.

examples.title: Split PDF Generated from XML into Chapter PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to convert an XML file to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then split the resulting document into separate per‑chapter PDF files (one page per chapter).

examples.title: Validate PDF/A-2b Compliance After Converting XML to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load an XML file with Aspose.Pdf, convert it to a PDF, and then validate the resulting document for PDF/A‑2b compliance, outputting a validation log.

examples.title: Validate XML with XSD and Generate PDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: The example validates an XML file against an XSD schema and, if valid, loads it into an Aspose.Pdf Document via XmlLoadOptions to create a PDF.

examples.title: XML to PDF Conversion Tests with XSLT
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert XML documents to PDF using Aspose.Pdf with and without XSLT transformations, and provides NUnit unit tests for each scenario.

examples.title: Convert XML to PDF via XSLT and XSL‑FO using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: The example loads an XML file and an XSLT stylesheet, transforms the XML to XSL‑FO, and then creates a PDF with Aspose.Pdf. It demonstrates handling multiple XML namespaces during the transformation.
